For a client in Amsterdam, we are looking for a interim Data Analyst. The ideal candidate will use their passion for big data and analytics to provide insights to the business covering a range of topics. They will be responsible for conducting both recurring and ad hoc analysis for business users.
Responsibilities

Stakeholder management and communication skills
Must be based in the Netherlands (sponsorship not offered)

An interim position

4428848806,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-experis-nederland-4428848806?position=2&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=Bj22g27n1urm1bgzjRo68A%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Experis Nederland,"The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands","As a Data Analyst within the Asset Finance EPT (Empowered Product Team) you will play a key role in enabling a data-driven Originate-to-Distribute (OtD) business. Based in The Hague, you will support our Asset Finance professionals by ensuring that data is accurate, reliable, and translated into meaningful insights for both internal stakeholders and external investors. In this role, you will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, contributing directly to the quality of our reporting, the robustness of our data chain, and the continuous improvement of our Asset Finance processes. Work is hybrid and the official location for this job is The Hague.
Responsibilities
You will conduct data analysis and delivery and support the functional support team’s day-to-day operations, including frequent meetings with users. Other responsibilities include:
Managing the applications.
Working towards team goals and supporting everyday processes and testing for colleagues in your Asset Finance team EPT.
Driving continuous improvements and process automation.
Executing Security Operations tasks to ensure that processes and applications are securely managed and in control.
Qualifications
Experience with data analysis (SQL, Excel, Power BI or similar tools).
Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex issues into manageable components.
Affinity with financial data (e.g. loans, portfolios, cashflows).
A structured and methodical approach to analyzing data and identifying root causes.
Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement.
Fluent in English, Dutch is a preference.
Please note that for this role you need to be already situated in the Netherlands.
For more information, please contact Ritsa (ritsa.paraskevopoulou@experis.nl).

As a Data Analyst within the Asset Finance EPT (Empowered Product Team) you will play a key role in enabling a data-driven Originate-to-Distribute (OtD) business. Based in The Hague, you will support our Asset Finance professionals by ensuring that data is accurate, reliable, and translated into meaningful insights for both internal stakeholders and external investors. In this role, you will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, contributing directly to the quality of our reporting, the robustness of our data chain, and the continuous improvement of our Asset Finance processes. Work is hybrid and the official location for this job is The Hague.



Responsibilities

  • You will conduct data analysis and delivery and support the functional support team’s day-to-day operations, including frequent meetings with users. Other responsibilities include:
  • Managing the applications.
  • Working towards team goals and supporting everyday processes and testing for colleagues in your Asset Finance team EPT.
  • Driving continuous improvements and process automation.
  • Executing Security Operations tasks to ensure that processes and applications are securely managed and in control.



Qualifications


  • Experience with data analysis (SQL, Excel, Power BI or similar tools).
  • Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex issues into manageable components.
  • Affinity with financial data (e.g. loans, portfolios, cashflows).
  • A structured and methodical approach to analyzing data and identifying root causes.
  • Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
  • A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement.
  • Fluent in English, Dutch is a preference.


Please note that for this role you need to be already situated in the Netherlands.


For more information, please contact Ritsa (ritsa.paraskevopoulou@experis.nl).

4433098260,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-us3-consulting-4433098260?position=4&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=XlsffceXpHYG%2Fo4nZs8rEw%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Us3 Consulting,Amsterdam Area,"Data Analyst

We are seeking a skilled Data Analyst to join our growing data and analytics team. You will be responsible for developing high-quality reporting and analytics solutions, transforming data into actionable insights, and working closely with both business and technical stakeholders to support data-driven decision-making.
Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and maintain Power BI reports and dashboards.
Analyse data to identify trends, patterns, and business insights.
Develop and optimise SQL queries for data extraction, validation, and analysis.
Work with Google BigQuery and modern cloud-based data platforms.
Collaborate with Data Engineers to build curated datasets using dbt and modern data architecture practices.
Support data quality, reconciliation, root cause analysis, and reporting governance.
Document reporting solutions and technical processes.
Participate in Agile delivery practices and stakeholder engagement activities.
Essential Skills & Experience
Strong SQL development and data analysis experience.
Hands-on experience with Power BI dashboard and report development.
Experience working with Google BigQuery or a similar cloud data warehouse.
Understanding of star schema and dimensional data modelling.
Experience with dbt and modern data transformation practices.
Knowledge of Medallion Architecture and layered data platforms.
Experience using GitHub, pull requests, and version control best practices.
Experience working with Microsoft SQL Server or similar relational databases.
Experience working within Agile delivery teams.
Strong communication, stakeholder management, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
If you are interested please apply quickly!

4432576007,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-sia-4432576007?position=5&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=dUtL%2FY2jyTdDKZDthHMl2Q%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Sia,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Sia is a next-generation, global management consulting group. Founded in 1999, we were born digital. Today our strategy and management capabilities are augmented by data science, enhanced by creativity and driven by responsibility. We’re optimists for change and we help clients initiate, navigate and benefit from transformation. We believe optimism is a force multiplier, helping clients to mitigate downside and maximize opportunity.

With expertise across a broad range of sectors and services, our 3,000 consultants serve clients worldwide from 48 locations in 19 countries. Our expertise delivers results. Our optimism transforms outcomes.
Job Description

Want to use data intelligently to deliver maximum value to clients? It's a challenge that suits you perfectly and energizes you. You're looking for challenges where you can not only advise but also deliver tangible results. You want to make a difference. Are you ready for the next phase? Ready to tackle and solve complex data challenges and further specialize in your data management field? Then we'd love to get to know you.
What you'll be doing at the client's site

As a Data Analyst, you'll play a key role with our clients. You'll advise on their data management, develop data strategies, and translate these into workable solutions to maximize the value of their data. You'll be involved in all phases of the project, from developing data governance frameworks to implementing data quality processes and advising on data analysis. Interested in a project like this?
Moreover:
You'll identify improvement opportunities through thorough analyses of data sources and processes.
You'll design and implement data architecture and models for improved interoperability and scalability.
You'll ensure more efficient and effective systems
column2: you'll advise and support data integration, migration, and transformation projects.

column1: You'll provide insights that support your clients in making the right business decisions.
You'll provide training and support to users to help them manage and use data effectively.
Qualifications
This is you

You're naturally curious, enjoy a bit of fun, but are also deadly serious when it comes to the content. Sound familiar? Great, that's what we appreciate in a colleague. Furthermore, in this role, we'd like you to:
Enjoy your work!
Enjoy collaborating with colleagues and clients on interesting issues. In fact, that's a key part of your job.
You want to develop yourself every day with your positive attitude and drive.
You have strong communication skills and, above all, understand the importance of listening. To the client, colleagues, and of course, yourself!
You don't do the same thing every day
column2: you prefer diverse and complex projects.

column1: You do what you promise. You're accurate and ensure your work is completed on time, without compromising on quality.

You're a true team player. As a part of our team, you can always count on support from your colleagues. Achievements are the result of successful collaboration, and we celebrate them together! We value this culture highly. What you bring
What you bring
Completed HBO (higher professional education) or WO (university education) degree
You speak fluent Dutch and English. If you speak German that's a plus!
At least one year of knowledge and experience with (meta)data management and data quality solutions

You possess relevant data and technical skills, such as data cleaning, data visualization, machine learning, knowledge of big data tools, and data warehousing. Knowledge of programming languages ​​is a plus!
You have a strong vision for data management within organizations.
What you can expect from us
Your development is our priority. Whether it’s through challenging projects, inspiring colleagues or personal growth, we invest in your success, every step of the way.
We offer:
An attractive salary that grows with your experience and performance.
A yearly bonus based on your individual and team results.
Sustainable and practical mobility options, whether you prefer to travel by train, bike, or your own vehicle.
A solid pension plan and additional benefits to support your well-being.
Freedom in where you work, from home, at the client’s office, or in one of our inspiring hubs in Amsterdam or Maastricht, including a home working allowance to make remote work comfortable.
26 days of holiday per year, with the opportunity to earn extra days as your seniority grows.
Plenty of learning opportunities, from mentoring and training programs to international projects that broaden your perspective.
A strong community, where connection matters – we organize regular social and sports activities to celebrate successes together.
Do you have the drive and enthusiasm to help build our great company, and does this position sound like a perfect fit for you? We'd love to get to know you!
Additional Information
Unfortunately, we are unable to provide a work permit for this position.

4432782477,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/digital-data-analyst-at-verisure-4432782477?position=9&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=NthZkyiyQr3OalFTQlsAkA%3D%3D,Digital Data Analyst,Verisure,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Marketing Team | HQ Netherlands, Amsterdam | 32–40 hrs/week
The Role

As our Digital Data Analyst, you will be the driving force behind reliable data tracking, meaningful performance insights, and data-driven decision-making across all of our digital marketing channels. You will sit within the Marketing team and work closely with our Performance Specialist, Website Specialist, and Developer to ensure we always have a clear, accurate, and actionable view of what is happening across our digital ecosystem.
This is a high-ownership role. You will not just report numbers, you will shape how the team understands and acts on data.
What You Will Do
Tracking & Data Integrity
Own and maintain our full tracking setup across GA4, GTM, pixels, and events
Ensure accurate and consistent data collection across all digital channels
Validate data quality, troubleshoot discrepancies, and work with developers on implementation
Performance Analysis & Insights
Analyse performance across paid, organic, and website channels
Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies and translate them into clear recommendations
Proactively flag risks and opportunities that impact performance
Leverage AI tools to accelerate insight generation and data exploration
Reporting & Dashboards
Own weekly and monthly performance reporting across key KPIs
Ensure clear visibility on efficiency metrics
Provide structured insights alongside data, not just numbers
Attribution & A/B Testing
Validate performance data across platforms and clarify what is driving results
Design and support A/B tests in collaboration with the Website Specialist and
Developer
Document test learnings and ensure they are applied to future decisions
What We Are Looking For
Must-Haves
3+ years of experience in digital analytics, web analytics, or marketing analytics
Strong hands-on experience with GA4 and Google Tag Manager
Proven ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable business insights
Strong analytical mindset with sharp attention to detail
Experience with A/B testing and experimentation methodologies
Fluent in English
In possession of, or willing to obtain, a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG)
Nice to Have
Basic knowledge of SQL or HTML/CSS
Experience using AI tools to support data workflows
GA4 or GTM certification
Background in performance marketing, e-commerce, or subscription businesses
Education
Bachelor's degree in Analytics, Data Science, Marketing, Business, Economics, or a related field
What We Offer
A role with real ownership and direct impact on marketing performance
An international, data-driven team of 4–5 digital specialists within a broader Marketing team of ~15
A modern analytics stack and the freedom to improve it
Hybrid working in line with our Amsterdam office policy
Opportunity to grow into a senior analytics, insights, or marketing performance role
Access to Verisure's learning & development framework and company mobility policy
About Verisure

Verisure has been established in the Netherlands since 2018 and employs over 700 people. At Verisure, we believe that people have the right to feel safe and secure. We offer families and small businesses the best protection with a comprehensive security solution. We do this with innovative products that Verisure develops in-house, fully taking care of our customers from alarm placement to maintenance and alarm response. Verisure is the market leader in security services in Europe and Latin America and, with 35 years of insight, experience, and innovation, protects 6.3 million people across 18 countries.

We believe it is important that our company reflects the communities and customers we protect and support worldwide. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB) are an essential part of who we are, firmly embedded in both our operations and our ESG strategy. Everyone with a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG), and where required a VVB, is welcome at our company. We offer equal opportunities to all employees to develop their talents and strive for an open, safe, and inclusive working environment.

Marketing Team | HQ Netherlands, Amsterdam | 32–40 hrs/week

The Role

As our Digital Data Analyst, you will be the driving force behind reliable data tracking, meaningful performance insights, and data-driven decision-making across all of our digital marketing channels. You will sit within the Marketing team and work closely with our Performance Specialist, Website Specialist, and Developer to ensure we always have a clear, accurate, and actionable view of what is happening across our digital ecosystem.

This is a high-ownership role. You will not just report numbers, you will shape how the team understands and acts on data.

What You Will Do

Tracking &
column2:
Data Integrity

  • Own and maintain our full tracking setup across GA4, GTM, pixels, and events
  • Ensure accurate and consistent data collection across all digital channels
  • Validate data quality, troubleshoot discrepancies, and work with developers on implementation

Performance Analysis &
column3:
Insights

  • Analyse performance across paid, organic, and website channels
  • Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies and translate them into clear recommendations
  • Proactively flag risks and opportunities that impact performance
  • Leverage AI tools to accelerate insight generation and data exploration

Reporting &
column4:
Dashboards

  • Own weekly and monthly performance reporting across key KPIs
  • Ensure clear visibility on efficiency metrics
  • Provide structured insights alongside data, not just numbers

Attribution &
column5:
A/B Testing

  • Validate performance data across platforms and clarify what is driving results
  • Design and support A/B tests in collaboration with the Website Specialist and

Developer

  • Document test learnings and ensure they are applied to future decisions

What We Are Looking For

Must-Haves

  • 3+ years of experience in digital analytics, web analytics, or marketing analytics
  • Strong hands-on experience with GA4 and Google Tag Manager
  • Proven ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable business insights
  • Strong analytical mindset with sharp attention to detail
  • Experience with A/B testing and experimentation methodologies
  • Fluent in English
  • In possession of, or willing to obtain, a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG)

Nice to Have

  • Basic knowledge of SQL or HTML/CSS
  • Experience using AI tools to support data workflows
  • GA4 or GTM certification
  • Background in performance marketing, e-commerce, or subscription businesses

Education

  • Bachelor's degree in Analytics, Data Science, Marketing, Business, Economics, or a related field

What We Offer

  • A role with real ownership and direct impact on marketing performance
  • An international, data-driven team of 4–5 digital specialists within a broader Marketing team of ~15
  • A modern analytics stack and the freedom to improve it
  • Hybrid working in line with our Amsterdam office policy
  • Opportunity to grow into a senior analytics, insights, or marketing performance role
  • Access to Verisure's learning &
column6:
development framework and company mobility policy

About Verisure

Verisure has been established in the Netherlands since 2018 and employs over 700 people. At Verisure, we believe that people have the right to feel safe and secure. We offer families and small businesses the best protection with a comprehensive security solution. We do this with innovative products that Verisure develops in-house, fully taking care of our customers from alarm placement to maintenance and alarm response. Verisure is the market leader in security services in Europe and Latin America and, with 35 years of insight, experience, and innovation, protects 6.3 million people across 18 countries.

We believe it is important that our company reflects the communities and customers we protect and support worldwide. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB) are an essential part of who we are, firmly embedded in both our operations and our ESG strategy. Everyone with a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG), and where required a VVB, is welcome at our company. We offer equal opportunities to all employees to develop their talents and strive for an open, safe, and inclusive working environment.

4104751387,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/finance-data-reporting-analist-at-axflow-bv-4104751387?position=24&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=MZ21bLSwRH29k66K7orGiw%3D%3D,Finance Data & Reporting Analist,AxFlow BV,"Lelystad, Flevoland, Netherlands","Ben jij analytisch sterk, werk je graag met data én krijg je energie van het bouwen van slimme dashboards en heldere rapportages?
Wil jij financiële data vertalen naar inzichten, structuur en automatisering die écht impact maken op onze business?
Dan hebben wij een mooie uitdaging voor jou.

Binnen onze afdeling Finance zijn wij op zoek naar een Finance Data & Reporting Analist die helpt bij het professionaliseren van rapportages, het ontwikkelen van Power BI dashboards en het verder automatiseren van informatievoorziening. Jij zorgt ervoor dat data betrouwbaar, inzichtelijk en toekomstbestendig wordt — met oog voor kwaliteit, controle en ISO-richtlijnen.
Wat ga je doen?
In deze rol werk je op het snijvlak van finance, data en reporting. Je ondersteunt Finance en het management met betrouwbare stuurinformatie en slimme analyses. Je houdt je onder andere bezig met:
Het ontsluiten, analyseren en structureren van financiële en operationele data
Het ontwikkelen en onderhouden van dashboards en rapportages
Het verbeteren en standaardiseren van rapportages (KPI’s, maandrapportages en managementinformatie)
Het automatiseren van terugkerende rapportages en datastromen (minder handwerk, meer kwaliteit)
Het signaleren van trends, afwijkingen en verbeterkansen op basis van data
Het ondersteunen van verbeter- en implementatieprojecten
Het bijdragen aan audits en ISO-richtlijnen, waaronder documentatie, reproduceerbaarheid en controleerbaarheid van data
Wat breng jij mee?
Een afgeronde HBO-opleiding, bij voorkeur in Finance, Bedrijfskunde of Data Analytics
Affiniteit met financiële data en rapportages
Ervaring met of sterke interesse in Power BI
Een analytische, gestructureerde en nauwkeurige werkwijze
Interesse in procesverbetering en automation
Een proactieve mindset: je denkt graag mee over hoe dingen slimmer en efficiënter kunnen
Goede communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels
Wat bieden wij?
Een inhoudelijke rol met directe impact op de organisatie
Veel ruimte om mee te bouwen aan een datagedreven Finance afdeling
Mogelijkheden om jezelf verder te ontwikkelen in Power BI, data-analyse en reporting
Samenwerken met betrokken collega’s in een professionele en informele werkomgeving
Flexibiliteit en ruimte voor eigen initiatief
Een salaris afhankelijk van leeftijd en ervaring
De cao Technische Groothandel is van toepassing, waarin o.a. een vitaliteitsbudget en de reiskosten woon/werkverkeer is geregeld.
Een 40-urige werkweek
25 Vakantiedagen en 13 atv-dagen
Een premievrij pensioen
Deelname aan onze bonusregeling
Interesse?
Zie jij jezelf in deze rol en wil je bijdragen aan de verdere professionalisering van onze Finance organisatie?
Dan maken we graag kennis met je.

4433638945,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analist-bi-specialist-at-cimsolutions-4433638945?position=29&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=6TRplVs4E14htMIJf3CxtA%3D%3D,Data Analist / BI Specialist,CIMSOLUTIONS,"North Holland, Netherlands","Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.
Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.
Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:
Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding
Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach
Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd
Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events
Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen
Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels
Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.

4428944004,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-analyst-fp-a-data-at-robert-walters-4428944004?position=31&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=x%2F7bdwDNxSM3roqIM48V8g%3D%3D,Senior Analyst - FP&A & Data,Robert Walters,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Our client is a leading international technology organisation operating across multiple European markets. They are looking for a Senior Analyst FP&A & Analytics to join their Group Finance team in Amsterdam.

This position sits at the intersection of finance, analytics and data, offering an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys combining financial modelling with modern data tools to drive business insights and improve decision-making across an international organisation.
Description
Responsibilities
Develop, maintain and improve financial models to support forecasting, budgeting and strategic planning.
Analyse large financial and operational datasets using SQL, Python and other analytical tools.
Drive automation initiatives to improve reporting efficiency and reduce manual processes.
Own and maintain KPI datasets, ensuring data accuracy, consistency and governance across multiple business units.
Improve existing data structures, reporting processes and analytics capabilities.
Support scenario modelling, ad hoc financial analysis and business performance reviews.
Prepare management reports, presentations and board-level performance materials.
Partner with finance, data and business stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable analytical solutions.
Identify opportunities to improve reporting, automation and financial planning processes.
About You
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Mathematics or another quantitative discipline.
Approximately 5+ years of experience within FP&A, Financial Analysis, Business Analytics or a similar analytical role.
Strong financial modelling skills using Excel or Google Sheets.
Experience working with SQL and Python.
Experience with Power Query, Databricks or comparable data transformation tools is highly desirable.
Experience with Tableau, Looker or similar BI tools is considered an advantage.
Comfortable working with large datasets and translating complex information into actionable business insights.
Strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills.
Proactive, structured and able to work independently within an international environment.
What's on Offer
Salary up to €85,000 gross per year, depending on experience.
Performance-based annual bonus.
25+ vacation days.
Hybrid working model (2-3 days per week in the office).
Travel allowance.
Competitive pension scheme.
Excellent learning and development opportunities.
Opportunity to join a highly international organisation undergoing continuous growth and innovation.
Broad exposure to Group Finance, analytics and senior business stakeholders.
Robert Walters Netherlands is acting as an Employment Agency in relation to this vacancy.

4427061347,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-harnham-4427061347?position=34&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=cAOVUe5KPpK8PQ3qXCctzQ%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,Harnham,"The Randstad, Netherlands","Senior Data Analyst
Amsterdam, Netherlands
Competitive salary and benefits

This is an opportunity to join a high-impact data team at the heart of a large-scale digital platform. You will work on complex, real-world problems that directly influence product direction, commercial strategy, and customer experience. This role offers strong exposure to senior stakeholders and the chance to shape how data drives decision-making across the business.
The Company

They are a leading digital platform operating at scale across a high-traffic consumer marketplace. With millions of monthly users, they enable both individuals and businesses to connect, transact, and grow. Their product spans mobile and web, and they operate in a fast-paced, data-rich environment. Data plays a central role in how they optimise user experience, monetisation, and long-term growth.
The Role
Partner with product, commercial, and marketing stakeholders to define analytical priorities and deliver insights that drive decision-making
Translate ambiguous business questions into structured analysis and actionable outcomes
Build dashboards and reporting that focus on meaningful KPIs across revenue, growth, and customer behaviour
Analyse large-scale datasets to identify trends, risks, and opportunities across the platform
Influence stakeholders at all levels through clear and compelling communication of insights
Support experimentation and measurement strategies to improve product and commercial performance
Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve tracking, data quality, and metric definitions
Your Skills & Experience
Strong commercial experience in data analysis within a product-led digital environment such as e-commerce or marketplaces
Advanced SQL skills, including working with complex datasets and optimised queries
Hands-on experience with Python for analysis, modelling, or automation
Familiarity with modern cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
Experience using BI tools such as Tableau to create impactful dashboards
Strong understanding of key business concepts including customer lifecycle, monetisation, and growth metrics
Confident communicator with the ability to influence stakeholders and translate data into business value
Comfortable working in ambiguous environments and proactively identifying opportunities
What They Offer
Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package
A collaborative, cross-functional working environment
Opportunity to influence business and product strategy at scale
Strong career progression and exposure to senior leadership
Access to modern data tools and technology
How to Apply

Senior Data Analyst

Amsterdam, Netherlands

Competitive salary and benefits


This is an opportunity to join a high-impact data team at the heart of a large-scale digital platform. You will work on complex, real-world problems that directly influence product direction, commercial strategy, and customer experience. This role offers strong exposure to senior stakeholders and the chance to shape how data drives decision-making across the business.


The Company

They are a leading digital platform operating at scale across a high-traffic consumer marketplace. With millions of monthly users, they enable both individuals and businesses to connect, transact, and grow. Their product spans mobile and web, and they operate in a fast-paced, data-rich environment. Data plays a central role in how they optimise user experience, monetisation, and long-term growth.


The Role

  • Partner with product, commercial, and marketing stakeholders to define analytical priorities and deliver insights that drive decision-making
  • Translate ambiguous business questions into structured analysis and actionable outcomes
  • Build dashboards and reporting that focus on meaningful KPIs across revenue, growth, and customer behaviour
  • Analyse large-scale datasets to identify trends, risks, and opportunities across the platform
  • Influence stakeholders at all levels through clear and compelling communication of insights
  • Support experimentation and measurement strategies to improve product and commercial performance
  • Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve tracking, data quality, and metric definitions


Your Skills &
column2:
Experience


  • Strong commercial experience in data analysis within a product-led digital environment such as e-commerce or marketplaces
  • Advanced SQL skills, including working with complex datasets and optimised queries
  • Hands-on experience with Python for analysis, modelling, or automation
  • Familiarity with modern cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
  • Experience using BI tools such as Tableau to create impactful dashboards
  • Strong understanding of key business concepts including customer lifecycle, monetisation, and growth metrics
  • Confident communicator with the ability to influence stakeholders and translate data into business value
  • Comfortable working in ambiguous environments and proactively identifying opportunities


What They Offer


  • Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package
  • A collaborative, cross-functional working environment
  • Opportunity to influence business and product strategy at scale
  • Strong career progression and exposure to senior leadership
  • Access to modern data tools and technology


How to Apply

If you are a commercially minded Senior Data Analyst looking to make a tangible impact, apply now to find out more.

Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.

4401722516,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/bi-specialist-at-attero-4401722516?position=44&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=UgXlLjHFLOMGVx%2BrrpSlyg%3D%3D,BI Specialist,Attero,"Apeldoorn, Gelderland, Netherlands","Standplaats: Apeldoorn

Attero is een landelijk en internationaal opererend milieubedrijf dat al ruim 90 jaar werkt aan een schonere, circulaire toekomst. Wij winnen energie en grondstoffen terug uit afval en dragen zo bij aan een duurzame leefomgeving. Data speelt een steeds belangrijkere rol binnen onze organisatie. Daarom zoeken wij een BI Specialist die helpt onze data-infrastructuur verder te professionaliseren en toekomstbestendig te maken.

Wat ga je doen?Als BI Specialist ben je een belangrijke schakel in het ontsluiten, structureren en benutten van data binnen Attero. Je werkt aan betrouwbare, schaalbare en veilige data-oplossingen die collega’s ondersteunen bij rapportages, analyses en besluitvorming.
Je Houdt Je Onder Andere Bezig Met
Het ontwerpen, bouwen en onderhouden van databases, datasets en datamodellen
Het optimaliseren van datastromen en het waarborgen van datakwaliteit
Het ontwikkelen en beheren van ETL/ELT-processen in Azure Data Factory, met behulp van bestaande tooling
Het mede vormgeven en doorontwikkelen van de datawarehouse-architectuur
Het combineren van data uit verschillende bronnen en het beschikbaar maken daarvan voor analyses en visualisaties, bijvoorbeeld in Power BI
Het toepassen van best practices op het gebied van data security en privacy
Het meewerken aan data-innovatie, migraties en nieuwe data-projecten
Het zorgen dat data-oplossingen na oplevering goed landen in de lijnorganisatie en daadwerkelijk gebruikt worden.
Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s uit IT, data en de business en neemt actief deel aan projecten binnen een agile/scrum werkwijze.
Wat neem je mee?Je bent analytisch sterk, werkt gestructureerd en krijgt energie van complexe data-vraagstukken. Je denkt in oplossingen en weet technische keuzes goed te onderbouwen.
Daarnaast Neem Je Mee
Minimaal 3 tot 5 jaar werkervaring in een vergelijkbare functie
Een afgeronde HBO-opleiding in IT, bij voorkeur met een specialisatie in data of bedrijfskundige ICT
Ervaring met SQL en het schrijven van schone, onderhoudbare en goed gestructureerde code
Kennis van dimensioneel modelleren en datamodellering
Ervaring met Azure-omgevingen, bij voorkeur Azure Data Factory
Affiniteit met data-analyse en datavisualisatie, bijvoorbeeld Power BI en IBCS-concepten
Ervaring met werken volgens agile en scrum
De motivatie om samen te werken, kennis te delen en continu te verbeteren.

Wie ben jij?Je bent een teamplayer die verantwoordelijkheid neemt en graag impact maakt. Je werkt zorgvuldig, denkt mee over verbeteringen en zoekt actief de samenwerking op. Je herkent jezelf in de Attero-principes: samen werken, blijven verbeteren en bijdragen aan een duurzame toekomst.
Wat krijg je?Bij Attero zorgen we goed voor je, in elke fase van je loopbaan. Je kunt rekenen op:
Een marktconform salaris, afgestemd op jouw opleiding en ervaring
Een goede verlofregeling, met de mogelijkheid om extra verlofuren bij te kopen
Een persoonlijk arbeidsvoorwaardenbudget van 13,5%, dat je naar eigen inzicht kunt laten uitbetalen of inzetten
Een flexbudget dat je naar eigen invulling kunt besteden
Ruimte voor ontwikkeling en doorgroei. Je krijgt vrijheid om jezelf verder te brengen en toegang tot onze Attero Academy met e-learnings die aansluiten op jouw functie
Het Attero Fit & Vitaal programma, met initiatieven die bijdragen aan jouw duurzame inzetbaarheid
Voordeel op je zorgverzekering en particuliere verzekeringen, zoals auto, brand, opstal en aansprakelijkheid
Een goede pensioenregeling, zodat het ook na je loopbaan goed geregeld is.
Klaar om impact te maken?Mail gerust met Ruben Kieft, Recruiter. Hij is bereikbaar via ruben.kieft@attero.nl.
Wil je solliciteren? Druk dan op de knop ‘Direct solliciteren’. Wie weet zien we je snel op locatie!

4414675936,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-walker-dunlop-4414675936?position=49&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=AztKjYbgUfz6gaVI7m811g%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,Walker & Dunlop,Amsterdam Area,"Department
WDTech - R&D

We are Walker & Dunlop. We are one of the largest providers of capital to the commercial real estate industry, enabling real estate owners and operators to bring their visions of communities — where people live, work, shop, and play — to life. We are committed to creating meaningful social, environmental, and economic change in our communities.
Department Overview
WDTech is W&D’s in-house technology team – a group of collaborative and highly skilled technology professionals, all of whom are leading experts in real estate data, data science, and technology.

WDTech Engineering builds solutions that impact not only our products but also the people and processes across our organization. A commitment to innovation and a passion for disrupting the old-fashioned real estate industry are our highest priorities.
The Impact You Will Have

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will play a key role in delivering trusted data insights and analytics that support business and product decision-making across the organization. This role is responsible for analyzing complex datasets, developing reporting solutions and dashboards, and translating data into actionable insights that improve operational effectiveness and support strategic initiatives.

Working closely with Data Analysts, BI Analysts, Data Engineers, Data QA Engineers, Data Scientists, and Product Managers, you will help ensure data products are accurate, scalable, and aligned with evolving business needs as Walker & Dunlop continues to grow as a data-driven organization.
Primary Responsibilities
Analyze and curate data sources to support business and product stakeholders in making informed decisions.
Lead key components of the analytical lifecycle, including data exploration, analysis, reporting, and insight delivery.
Translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for technical and non-technical audiences.
Develop and maintain Power BI dashboards, reports, and analytical solutions.
Perform data wrangling, transformation, and analysis using SQL and enterprise analytical databases.
Define and document datasets, business logic, and reporting definitions to support consistent data usage.
Partner with data and product teams to support data governance, data quality, and data management processes.
Analyze user engagement, operational, and product data to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
Mentor junior analysts and promote best practices in analytics, visualization, and stakeholder collaboration.
Perform other duties as assigned
Education And Experience
Bachelor’s degree preferred, preferably in Computer Science, Data Analytics, Information Systems, Mathematics, or a related field.
6+ years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or analytics roles with demonstrated ownership of end-to-end analytical projects.
Strong experience working with enterprise analytical databases such as Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, or similar technologies.
Experience developing dashboards and reporting solutions using Power BI, Tableau, or similar visualization tools.
Experience with SQL, data transformation, and analytical reporting workflows.
Experience with Python and geospatial analysis preferred.
Real estate, financial services, or related industry experience preferred.
Knowledge, Skills And Abilities
Deep expertise in SQL and data analysis techniques.
Strong proficiency with data visualization and reporting tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Understanding of data modeling, ETL processes, and analytical best practices.
Ability to communicate technical concepts and analytical findings clearly to business and technical audiences.
Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work collaboratively across technical and business teams in a fast-paced environment.
Familiarity with AI-enabled tools that support reporting, documentation, and analysis workflows preferred.
High level of accountability, attention to detail, and commitment to continuous improvement.
Ability to show ownership of your work, take on challenges and acknowledge growth opportunities, and demonstrate patience when learning new processes
Courtesy, respect, and thoughtfulness in teaming with colleagues and other stakeholders
What We Offer
You will have the opportunity to accelerate in our rapidly growing organization.
Agile working environment with flexible working hours and location, career advancement, and competitive compensation package.
We are a family friendly company.
We arrange social activities to help our employees and families become familiar with each other and our culture.
In addition to other benefits, we offer a pension scheme and 100% complimentary and confidential mental health services.
EEO Statement

We are committed to equity in all steps of the recruitment and employment experience. We believe in equal access to opportunities in our workplace. We do not tolerate discrimination, including harassment, based on any characteristic protected by applicable law, such as race, color, national origin, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, sex, age, disability, veteran or military status, and genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We strive to be a safe place to ask questions, build professional relationships, and develop careers.
SPAM

Please be wary of recruitment scams. An indication of a scam might be a request for sensitive or bank information at the time of application or emails coming from a non walkerdunlop.com email address. Please call us at 301.215.5500, if you have any concerns about information requested during or after the application process.

This is an opportunity to take on a highly visible Senior Data Analyst role where your insights will directly influence product, commercial strategy, and customer experience at scale. You will work with complex datasets and senior stakeholders, shaping decisions that impact millions of users across a leading digital platform.
The Company

They are a well-established digital platform business operating at significant scale across the Benelux region. With millions of monthly users, they connect consumers and businesses through a marketplace model while supporting sustainable and circular commerce. Their teams are cross-functional, data-driven, and focused on continuous product and commercial innovation. Analytics plays a central role in enabling smarter decisions across the organisation.
The Role
Partner with product, marketing, and commercial teams to translate business challenges into actionable analytical plans
Identify growth opportunities and risks through deep analysis of user behaviour, conversion, and revenue trends
Design and build dashboards that clearly communicate performance and key business metrics
Analyse large, complex datasets to uncover meaningful insights and inform decision-making
Influence stakeholders across all levels through clear storytelling and data-driven recommendations
Support experimentation and measurement frameworks to evaluate product and marketing initiatives
Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve data quality, tracking, and metric definitions
Your Skills and Experience
Strong commercial experience in data analytics within a digital, product-led, or marketplace environment
Advanced SQL skills and confidence working with large-scale datasets
Experience using Python for analytical work, modelling, and automation
Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
Proficiency with BI tools such as Tableau or similar for building impactful dashboards
Strong understanding of business metrics including conversion, retention, and customer lifetime value
Ability to translate ambiguous problems into clear analytical approaches
Confident communicator who can influence stakeholders and challenge thinking constructively
What They Offer
Competitive salary and benefits package
Opportunity to work on high-impact projects influencing product and commercial strategy
Collaborative, cross-functional working environment
Clear scope for career progression within a data-driven organisation
Exposure to large-scale data and modern data tooling
How to Apply
If you are interested in this Senior Data Analyst opportunity, please apply with your CV to be considered.

Bij Pricewise help je miljoenen consumenten slimmer kiezen: je analyseert (klant)data en bouwt slimme CRM-campagnes om de klantervaring te verbeteren.
Wat doe je als Data analist & CRM specialist bij Pricewise

Als Data Analist & CRM Specialist ben jij de analytische kracht binnen ons marketingteam en vertaal je klantdata naar slimme (CRM-)campagnes. Je analyseert (klant)data en klantreviews en zet inzichten om in acties die de klantervaring én het klantvertrouwen versterken. Je werkt nauw samen met IT en de rest van het marketingteam om relevante, gepersonaliseerde communicatie neer te zetten. Je werkt autonoom binnen een hecht team, terwijl je tegelijk profiteert van de internationale kennis, technologie en groeikracht van onze Mavriq-groep.
Dit vind je leuk om te doen:
Analyseren van datasets om klantgedrag, commerciële kansen en optimalisaties te identificeren.
Ontwikkelen van (gepersonaliseerde) CRM-campagnes die klantbinding, conversie en klantwaarde vergroten.
Opzetten en optimaliseren van geautomatiseerde e-mailflows, nieuwsbrieven en klantreizen (incl. A/B-tests), met als doel conversie en klantretentie te verbeteren.
Campagneprestaties monitoren en bijdragen aan duidelijke, datagedreven rapportages.
Bouwen aan een marketing automation-omgeving die volop in ontwikkeling is.
Dit zoek jij verder in een baan
Goed vast salaris van €4.000–€5.500 per maand (excl. vakantiegeld), passend bij jouw ervaring.
Mooie bonus die jou beloont voor de impact die je maakt.
Leuke teamuitjes, gezellige borrels en een dagelijkse gezamenlijke lunch, geheel verzorgd.
Meebouwen en innoveren aan een vergelijkingsplatform in het snel evoluerende e-commercelandschap.
Ruimte voor jouw ideeën binnen een ondernemende cultuur waar jouw initiatief telt.
Een jong, energiek, lokaal team met korte lijnen.
Een fijne combinatie van vaste, bruisende kantoordagen en focustijd thuis.
Deel uitmaken van een snelgroeiende internationale groep van vergelijkers.
Focus op persoonlijke groei en ontwikkeling, waarbij je samenwerkt met internationale collega’s met uitgebreide expertise in marketing en data-analyse.
Reiskostenvergoeding, premievrij pensioen, en fijne extra’s (zoals sportschoolvergoeding).
Hier herken jij jezelf in
Nieuwsgierig, autonoom en ondernemend
column2: je blijft continu leren.

column1: Ervaring in een data-, CRM- of marketinganalyse-rol.
Master in (digital) marketing, business (analytics) of een verwante studie.

Ervaring met datastructuren en CRM-tools, zoals Customer.io, Selligent of Mapp.
Je leeft je in de klant in en weet hoe je klantvertrouwen opbouwt.
Sterke communicatieve vaardigheden
column2: je presenteert inzichten helder.

column1: Je werkt nauwkeurig, houdt overzicht en schakelt makkelijk tussen projecten.
Interesse in AI en LLM’s om productiviteit te verhogen.
Je spreekt en schrijft Nederlands (minimaal B2-niveau).
Basiskennis van privacy, GDPR en datawetgeving.
Over Pricewise

Pricewise is een van de grootste vergelijkingssites op het gebied van energie, verzekeringen, internet, tv, leningen en meer. Vanuit ons hoofdkantoor in Amsterdam bieden wij consumenten de mogelijkheid om gemakkelijk over te stappen naar de beste aanbieding in de markt. Via ons vergelijkingsplatform bespaarden al miljoenen mensen honderden euro’s per jaar. Sinds 2024 is Pricewise onderdeel van Mavriq, een snelgroeiende groep van meer dan 15 vergelijkingsplatformen in Spanje, Italië, Frankrijk, Duitsland en Mexico.

4433659345,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analist-bi-specialist-at-cimsolutions-4433659345?position=55&pageNum=0&refId=HWk3asZHr%2BYOR8mBpqvx7w%3D%3D&trackingId=SVHrN0u7O5UyM4FFdnL4ZA%3D%3D,Data Analist / BI Specialist,CIMSOLUTIONS,"Groningen, Netherlands","Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.
Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.
Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

Job Title: Excel Expert
Job Type: Contract
Location: Remote

Job Summary: In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters.
Key Responsibilities
Review, analyze, and enhance complex Excel files relevant to business operations, strategy, and data analysis.
Provide detailed feedback and examples of best practices in Excel for operational and consulting use cases (excluding finance).
Design, document, and share templates or solutions that reflect expert knowledge for AI learning purposes.
Collaborate with the customer’s team to identify key workflows and operational challenges represented in Excel documents.
Evaluate and simulate real-world business problems using advanced Excel features and formulas.
Communicate clearly and effectively in written and verbal formats, ensuring precise and comprehensive documentation.
Contribute to the creation of data analysis case studies and operational scenarios leveraging Excel expertise.
Required Skills And Qualifications
Expert-level proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including advanced functions, pivot tables, data validation, and automation tools.
Proven experience developing Excel solutions for business operations, strategy, or consulting environments.
Strong analytical skills and the ability to solve complex, non-financial business problems using Excel.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a keen eye for detail.
Ability to document processes, create instructional materials, and provide clear, actionable feedback.
Experience with data analysis, scenario modeling, and workflow optimization in Excel.
Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a remote setting.
Preferred Qualifications
Background in business operations, strategy, or management consulting.
Familiarity with AI training or contributing to machine learning datasets in a domain capacity.
Experience developing Excel-based tools or dashboards for operational excellence initiatives.

Job Description

Job Title: Excel Expert

Job Type: Contract

Location: Remote

Job Summary: In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters.

Key Responsibilities

  • Review, analyze, and enhance complex Excel files relevant to business operations, strategy, and data analysis.
  • Provide detailed feedback and examples of best practices in Excel for operational and consulting use cases (excluding finance).
  • Design, document, and share templates or solutions that reflect expert knowledge for AI learning purposes.
  • Collaborate with the customer’s team to identify key workflows and operational challenges represented in Excel documents.
  • Evaluate and simulate real-world business problems using advanced Excel features and formulas.
  • Communicate clearly and effectively in written and verbal formats, ensuring precise and comprehensive documentation.
  • Contribute to the creation of data analysis case studies and operational scenarios leveraging Excel expertise.

Required Skills And Qualifications

  • Expert-level proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including advanced functions, pivot tables, data validation, and automation tools.
  • Proven experience developing Excel solutions for business operations, strategy, or consulting environments.
  • Strong analytical skills and the ability to solve complex, non-financial business problems using Excel.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a keen eye for detail.
  • Ability to document processes, create instructional materials, and provide clear, actionable feedback.
  • Experience with data analysis, scenario modeling, and workflow optimization in Excel.
  • Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a remote setting.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Background in business operations, strategy, or management consulting.
  • Familiarity with AI training or contributing to machine learning datasets in a domain capacity.
  • Experience developing Excel-based tools or dashboards for operational excellence initiatives.

4435209885,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-management-consultant-at-ilionx-4435209885?position=4&pageNum=2&refId=Phy6znG8gtVdNom8Cx6NYg%3D%3D&trackingId=TajP7FnWbtZlC7%2Bjm5H3Bg%3D%3D,Data Management Consultant,ilionx,"Groningen, Groningen, Netherlands","Wil jij het datamanagement bij onze klanten helpen opzetten, borgen en verder professionaliseren? Dan zijn wij met ons team op zoek naar jou!
Jouw functie als Data Management Consultant

Als data management consultant adviseer en ondersteun je onze klanten rondom het effectief beheren, ordenen en optimaliseren van hun data assets en processen. Samen met jouw team speel je een cruciale rol in het waarborgen van de datakwaliteit, het implementeren van datamanagement en het hiermee ondersteunen van datagedreven besluitvorming.

Daarnaast werk je dagdagelijks nauw samen met meerdere afdelingen en vakinhoudelijke collega's om ervoor te zorgen dat onze én de data van de klant zo effectief mogelijk wordt gebruikt in processen om de bedrijfsdoelstellingen te bereiken.
Wat bieden wij jou:
Een salaris rond de €4.000,- en €6.500,- op basis van een fulltime aanstelling
Vast contract, exclusief een aantrekkelijke bonus vanaf jouw eerste werkdag
Ruime mobiliteitsvergoeding waarbij je ook privé kunt gaan rijden
Budget voor de aanschaf en inrichting van een eventuele thuiswerkplek
Goede pensioenregeling
Een omgeving waarin het hybride werken compleet omarmd wordt
Diverse trainingen op maat met certificaten die jouw expertise onderstrepen
Alle ruimte tot zelfontplooiing, zowel privé als op zakelijk vlak
Leuke evenementen en uitjes, waaronder onze jaarlijkse ilionx wintersport
Wat vragen wij van jou:
Overtuigingskracht om de waarde van data in een organisatie op meerdere niveaus over te brengen
Je bent in staat om een (gedrags)verandering in gang te zetten
Ervaring met het maken van business cases in het data domein en hiermee de waarde van data aan te tonen
Verder heb je:
Een diploma op HBO en/of WO opleidingsniveau
Minimaal 5 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring in datamanagement en het ontwikkelen en implementeren van data-strategieën
Kennis van databeheerprincipes en –praktijken en ervaring om deze te borgen in organisaties
Een certificering als Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP) is een sterke pré
Kennis van data-modellering, data architectuur, master data management, data-analyse en tooling is een pré

Bovenstaande criteria zijn een indicatie van het profiel dat we zoeken. We beseffen dat elk individu een unieke set aan vaardigheden, expertise, skills en denkwijzen met zich meebrengt. Tegelijkertijd blijkt uit onderzoek dat sommigen pas solliciteren als er een 100% match is. Hierbij nodigen we je uit om te solliciteren als je je herkent in het profiel, óók als je niet aan alle eisen voldoet!
Het team

Binnen de unit Digitale Strategie werken we dagelijks nauw samen met collega’s die net even dat stapje extra voor onze klanten in regio Noord-Nederland durven te zetten. En dat vooral met passie, gedrevenheid én enthousiasme.

Jouw manager Albert Jan zorgt hierin vooral voor een prettige werkomgeving waarin hij jouw persoonlijke ontwikkeling én de samenwerking met jouw collega’s juist alleen maar zal aanmoedigen. Dit doet hij op basis van onderling vertrouwen en het motto 'afspraak is afspraak'.
Lees hier praktijkervaringen van jouw toekomstige ilionx collega’s!

Binnen de unit Digitale Strategie werken we dagelijks nauw samen met collega’s die net even dat stapje extra voor onze klanten in regio Noord-Nederland durven te zetten. En dat vooral met passie, gedrevenheid én enthousiasme.


Jouw manager Albert Jan zorgt hierin vooral voor een prettige werkomgeving waarin hij jouw persoonlijke ontwikkeling én de samenwerking met jouw collega’s juist alleen maar zal aanmoedigen. Dit doet hij op basis van onderling vertrouwen en het motto 'afspraak is afspraak'.


Lees hier praktijkervaringen van jouw toekomstige ilionx collega’s!

4435231638,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-engineer-energy-tech-%F0%9F%94%8B-at-haystack-people-4435231638?position=5&pageNum=2&refId=Phy6znG8gtVdNom8Cx6NYg%3D%3D&trackingId=HWZK3jD7srpzO2VWBbFg6w%3D%3D,Data Engineer (Energy Tech) 🔋,Haystack People,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Jij maakt het algoritme dat real-time bepaalt hoe energie wordt opgeslagen, verbruikt en verhandeld.
Over de organisatie
We zijn een softwaregedreven energiebedrijf dat eigenlijk alle lagen van de energiemarkt zelf bouwt
Wat we doen: klanten (agrariërs met zonnepanelen, logistieke centra, windparken, batterijfarms) krijgen dynamische prijzen per kwartier.
Wij sturen hun apparaten aan zodat ze voordeel halen uit lage prijzen, en wij bieden die vraag/aanbod aan op drie markten tegelijk. Dat maakt onze klanten slim van energie, en ons rendement.
De uitdaging

Vier jaar geleden konden we alleen aan/uit schakelen. Nu kunnen windturbines 80% dimmen, batterijen op elk moment van de dag geladen of ontladen worden, en we bieden op drie verschillende markten tegelijk. Die complexiteit groeit exponentieel. We bouwen daarom nu de hele data- en forecasting-infrastructuur opnieuw.
Wat je gaat doen
Herstructureren: veel verschillende databronnen met veel overlap → één duidelijke, schone architectuur
Development & production-pipelines verbeteren — met steeds meer AI-tools en testen die daarop moeten anticiperen
Forecasting-modellen meedenken die real-time bepalen hoe we energie kunnen sturen
Code en architectuur reviewen met juniors in het team
Meedenken op business-niveau: waarom bepaalde data-beslissingen rendement (en impact) hebben
Tech stack
SQL — niet alleen queries, maar database-architectuur, optimization, data modeling op strategisch niveau
Python — code reviews, deployment pipelines, API design & integratie
Azure Event Hubs — we werken real-time met data streams, jij helpt dit te schalen
Development & production-pipelines — testing automation, deployment, monitoring
Bonus (veel waard):
Kubernetes — we overwegen onze scheduler-omgeving hierop om te zetten, ervaring daarmee is goud
DevOps-mindset — infrastructure as code, pipelines, observability
Azure cloud in het algemeen
Ervaring met AI-tooling in codingproces — we beginnen juist daar mee
Twijfel je ergens over je profiel? Reageer gewoon — wij kijken naar inhoud en laten veel graag passen.

Context: Concepten tellen meer dan gereedschap. Je kent Kafka niet maar snapt event streaming? Je hebt AWS Kinesis gebruikt maar nooit Azure Event Hubs? Prima — de principes zijn hetzelfde, de namen anders. Je leert snel.
Wat je krijgt
Salaris: €5.000–€8.000/maand (senior €8.000+)
Bonus: afhankelijk van prestatie boven verwachting
Pensioen: volledig door ons vergoed
Impact: je data bepaalt real-time welke turbines draaien, welke batterijen laden
🚫 Visa sponsorship niet mogelijk
👉 Interesse? Stuur direct een bericht — dan krijg je snel context en de eerste gespreksafspraak.
Haystack People werkt exclusief samen met deze organisatie voor deze rol.

4436733675,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-data-entry-specialist-healthcare-at-global-data-support-4436733675?position=9&pageNum=2&refId=Phy6znG8gtVdNom8Cx6NYg%3D%3D&trackingId=Ui2nsIO2BU7GeUBMHQ3bfQ%3D%3D,Junior Data Entry Specialist (Healthcare),Global Data Support,Netherlands,"This vacancy is only open to candidates who:
·       Currently reside in the Netherlands.
·       Have a valid BSN number.
·       Are able to attend in-person team meetings in Amsterdam once or twice per month.
﻿Applications that do not meet these requirements will not be considered.
Please note that only applications submitted via email to info@globaldatasupport.com will be reviewed.
When submitting your application, please begin your cover letter by answering the following questions:
·       Do you currently live in the Netherlands?
·       Do you have a valid BSN number?
·       Are you able to meet the team in Amsterdam once or twice per month?
About Global Data Support
Global Data Support is a full-service healthcare market research agency working with more than 100 Life Sciences clients across 25+ countries.

We support pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies by identifying patients with rare and complex diseases, mapping healthcare professionals, hospitals, and treatment centres, and uncovering clinical expertise across oncology and rare diseases.
By combining healthcare expertise, high-quality research, and innovative data solutions, we help our clients improve patient access to diagnosis and treatment worldwide.
About the Role
We’re looking for a Junior Data Entry Specialist (Healthcare) to join our growing team on an initial 6-month contract (36 hours per week), with a strong possibility of a permanent position.
The role is fully remote within the Netherlands, with in-person team meetups in Amsterdam every one to two weeks.
Preferred start date: 1 August 2026.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone at the beginning of their career who enjoys working with data, has exceptional attention to detail, and takes pride in producing accurate, high-quality work.

Your primary responsibility will be researching, validating, and maintaining healthcare data through structured online research. You’ll collect, verify, and update information in our databases while ensuring every record is accurate, complete, and fully traceable.
We’re looking for someone who enjoys structured, detail-oriented work while also being proactive enough to spot inconsistencies, ask questions, and suggest smarter ways of working.
As you become familiar with our processes, you’ll also have opportunities to improve workflows by incorporating AI and other data tools into your day-to-day work.
What You’ll Do
·       Research healthcare professionals, hospitals, and treatment centres through structured online research.
·       Collect, validate, and maintain high-quality healthcare data.
·       Enter and update information in internal databases.
·       Perform quality control checks to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
·       Document research sources and maintain complete traceability.
·       Identify inconsistencies and resolve data quality issues.
·       Contribute ideas to improve workflows and automate repetitive tasks using AI and other data tools.
Must-Haves
·       Reside in the Netherlands and possess a valid BSN number.
·       Available to start on 1 September 2026.
·       Excellent English communication skills (Dutch is not required).
·       Willing to meet the team in Amsterdam every one to two weeks.
·       Strong Excel skills, including lookups, pivot tables, and data cleaning.
·       Excellent attention to detail and the ability to perform accurate, consistent work.
·       Curious about healthcare and motivated to learn about hospitals, diseases, healthcare professionals, and the wider healthcare landscape.
·       A proactive mindset with strong critical-thinking skills—you enjoy spotting inconsistencies, asking questions, and identifying opportunities to improve processes.
·       Able to work independently, manage your own workload, and clearly document your work.
·       Recent HBO graduate or early-career professional with a strong willingness to learn and develop.
Nice-to-Haves
·       Experience using AI tools to improve productivity.
·       Basic dashboarding or data visualization skills.
What We Offer
·       A 6-month contract with the intention of offering a permanent position.
·       Competitive salary.
·       Flexible remote working with regular team meetups in Amsterdam.
·       Exposure to international healthcare and pharmaceutical projects.
·       The opportunity to help improve patient care worldwide through high-quality healthcare intelligence.
·       A supportive team with opportunities to learn, grow, and develop your skills.
How to Apply
Please send your CV to info@globaldatasupport.com.
Along with your CV, we’d love to hear:
·       Are you available to start on 1 August / 1 September 2026?
·       Why are you interested in healthcare data and research?
·       Do you have any experience with data entry, research, or working with structured datasets?

Work Mode: Remote

Our Company is seeking a Virtual Executive Assistant to provide high-level administrative and organizational support to senior professionals. This fully remote role is ideal for individuals who are highly organized, proactive, and capable of managing multiple responsibilities while maintaining discretion and professionalism.

In this position, you will act as a key support partner, helping to streamline daily operations, manage schedules, coordinate communications, and ensure priorities are handled efficiently. Your attention to detail, strong communication skills, and ability to anticipate needs will play a critical role in enabling leadership to focus on strategic initiatives.
Job Responsibilities:
1) Calendar and Communication Management
Manage executive calendars, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and reminders
Handle incoming emails and communications, prioritizing and responding when appropriate
Maintain clear and professional communication on behalf of executives
Coordinate internal and external correspondence
2) Task and Workflow Coordination
Track tasks, deadlines, and priorities to ensure timely completion
Organize and follow up on action items from meetings and communications
Assist in managing day-to-day administrative workflows
Ensure all activities are properly documented and tracked
3) Meeting and Travel Support
Coordinate meeting logistics including agendas, materials, and virtual setup
Take notes during meetings and distribute summaries or action items
Arrange travel plans, accommodations, and itineraries when required
Ensure all scheduling aligns with executive priorities
4) Documentation and Administrative Support
Prepare, format, and organize documents, reports, and presentations
Maintain organized digital files and records
Assist with data entry and information management tasks
Ensure documentation is accurate and easily accessible
Required Qualifications:
Strong verbal and written communication skills in English
Previous administrative, executive assistant, or coordination experience preferred
Excellent organizational and time management abilities
High level of discretion and professionalism when handling sensitive information
Ability to multitask and manage competing priorities
Comfortable using digital tools, calendars, and collaboration platforms
Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills
Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment
Adaptable and responsive to changing priorities
Benefits Package:
Competitive compensation based on experience
Performance-based incentives and recognition
Flexible remote working environment
Opportunities for professional growth and advancement
Ongoing training and development support
Collaborative and supportive team culture
We are committed to creating a professional and supportive remote environment where you can grow your skills while contributing meaningfully to executive operations.

Must),Jobgether,Netherlands,"This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Data Governance Consultant (Retail Exp. Must) based in Netherlands.
This remote role focuses on strengthening enterprise data trust and ensuring high-quality, well-governed data assets that support retail analytics and decision-making.
The consultant will play a key role in defining and enforcing data quality standards across reporting and BI environments.
You will work closely with analytics, engineering, and BI teams to validate data pipelines and ensure consistency across dashboards and curated datasets.
A strong emphasis is placed on SQL-driven analysis, dbt validation, and Snowflake-based data exploration.
The role contributes directly to improving data transparency through metadata, lineage tracking, and governance frameworks.
You will also support issue resolution by identifying anomalies, documenting root causes, and driving remediation efforts.
This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a data-driven, collaborative, and fast-paced retail analytics environment.
Accountabilities

Define, document, and maintain data quality rules, business definitions, and validation standards across key reporting and analytics datasets, ensuring consistency and reliability of business-critical information.
Perform deep data profiling and validation using SQL, dbt, and Snowflake to investigate anomalies, confirm transformation accuracy, and support data readiness for reporting use cases.
Partner with BI and analytics teams to ensure dashboards, KPIs, and semantic layers are built on trusted, well-governed datasets aligned with business expectations.
Monitor ongoing data quality checks, investigate recurring issues, identify root causes, and coordinate remediation with engineering and data ownership stakeholders.
Maintain and enhance metadata repositories, data lineage documentation, business glossaries, and data issue tracking systems to improve transparency and usability.
Promote data governance best practices by educating stakeholders on data standards, ownership models, certified data usage, and stewardship principles.
Requirements
Strong background in data governance, data stewardship, data quality, analytics, BI, or data management within complex data environments.
Advanced SQL skills with hands-on experience in data profiling, validation, reconciliation, and investigating discrepancies across datasets.
Practical experience with dbt including tests, documentation, lineage tracking, source freshness checks, and transformation validation workflows.
Experience working with Snowflake or comparable cloud data warehouse platforms, including knowledge of performance considerations and data structures.
Solid understanding of data governance principles including metadata management, data lineage, data lifecycle, and data quality dimensions.
Familiarity with BI concepts such as dimensional modeling, KPIs, semantic layers, and curated reporting datasets.
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to trace issues across source systems, transformations, and reporting layers.
Experience using collaboration tools such as ticketing systems, version control platforms, and documentation repositories.
Exposure to retail analytics environments and Agile/Scrum delivery models is highly preferred.
Benefits
Competitive compensation aligned with experience and industry benchmarks.
Fully remote work environment with flexible working arrangements.
Health, dental, and vision insurance coverage options.
Opportunities to work with modern data stack technologies including Snowflake and dbt.
Collaborative and cross-functional environment with strong focus on data-driven decision making.
Professional growth opportunities in data governance, analytics engineering, and enterprise data strategy.
How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

A strong emphasis is placed on SQL-driven analysis, dbt validation, and Snowflake-based data exploration.

You will also support issue resolution by identifying anomalies, documenting root causes, and driving remediation efforts.

Accountabilities

  • Define, document, and maintain data quality rules, business definitions, and validation standards across key reporting and analytics datasets, ensuring consistency and reliability of business-critical information.
  • Perform deep data profiling and validation using SQL, dbt, and Snowflake to investigate anomalies, confirm transformation accuracy, and support data readiness for reporting use cases.
  • Partner with BI and analytics teams to ensure dashboards, KPIs, and semantic layers are built on trusted, well-governed datasets aligned with business expectations.
  • Monitor ongoing data quality checks, investigate recurring issues, identify root causes, and coordinate remediation with engineering and data ownership stakeholders.
