If you have a keen interest in finance and are ready to embark on a learning journey, we have an exciting opportunity for you. Join us as our next Finance Graduate in the LUXE division based in Copenhagen.

We are looking for an ambitious Finance Graduate to join our Nordic finance team. If you have a sharp analytical mindset and a passion for numbers, this is your chance to grow within the world’s leading beauty company.
You will...
Participate in the daily work of the controlling team
Monitor and challenge the marketing spend
Draft the plan, Construct the budget, and trend for our marketing investments for the division in collaboration with our Marketing- and Commercial teams
Participate in Lead the monthly landing meetings with the brand teams
Ensure that the marketing planning tool is updated in line with the budget
Identify and react quickly on the financial risks and opportunities
Be part of engaging the Nordic Finance community with ideas and sharing of best practices
Your profile…
You have graduated with a Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or Business Administration within the past year
You have a strong analytical mindset and enjoy processing data
You are an experienced user of Microsoft Office and a super user of Excel
It is an advantage if you are familiar with ERP systems, preferably SAP
You are fluent and have excellent communication skills in English
You have strong organization skills: the ability to coordinate, plan, sense of priority, and good time management
You like to familiarize yourself with new things and thrive in a dynamic and fast-paced environment

We are looking for our new Finance Graduate to start as soon as possible. The employment is  fixed term for 12 months. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so do not wait to apply! We welcome everyone to apply no matter your gender, ethnicity, physical abilities, religion or sexual orientation.
What’s in it for you?

We offer you great challenges and opportunities including an individual career plan, coaching leadership, an extensive catalogue of e-learnings, competitive personnel benefits, modern offices, and a dynamic working environment with engaged and skilled colleagues. We believe in people and are dedicated to helping young talents build their professional careers. Our Nordic organization counts close to 1000 employees based in the four Nordic capitals, Denmark being the Nordic headquarter and counting for 500 employees.
Who we are?

Leading the world in beauty and beauty tech, L’Oréal is a global powerhouse with over 90,000 employees across 150 countries and 37 international brands. In 2024, the Group generated €43.48 billion in sales, driven by innovation and digital solutions, embracing entrepreneurship. For 115 years, we've devoted ourselves to fulfilling beauty aspirations worldwide. With 21 research centers globally and a dedicated team of over 4,000 scientists and 8,000 Digital talents, L’Oréal is focused on the future of beauty and becoming a Beauty Tech powerhouse.

In the Nordics, we are a vibrant community of nearly 1000 employees spread across our four Nordic capitals. We are committed to creating a more sustainable future for beauty and need passionate individuals to drive innovation in the digital realm. If you have fresh ideas, the courage to challenge the status quo, and a desire to create positive change for the planet, you will find a home with us. Together, we can create the beauty that moves the North.

About our L'Oréal Luxe division: This division is the home of iconic global beauty brands, offering a world of luxury through exceptional skincare, sophisticated makeup, and exquisite fragrances. We are dedicated to crafting unique, desirable experiences and products that define premium beauty. Joining L'Oréal Luxe means contributing to a heritage of elegance, innovation, and artistic expression, setting trends in the high-end beauty market.
Freedom to Go Beyond. That's the Beauty of L'Oréal.

4395329902,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/unsolicited-business-intelligence-data-science-at-systematic-4395329902?position=4&pageNum=12&refId=pQ%2BVDNtURBX4N64y7XRUAg%3D%3D&trackingId=g1Q6a5OQFBPL5RIcnapwIg%3D%3D,Unsolicited: Business Intelligence & Data Science,Systematic,"Aarhus, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Work With BI/data Science In An International Software Company
Are you motivated by making a difference and contributing to tomorrow’s BI/data science solutions? In which case you might be our new colleague.
You will create a strong foundation for strategic decisions
In your Business Intelligence or data science role, you will be working with various solutions that support Systematic’s business areas.
This involves the development of products and solutions for our customers and other business units – all in close collaboration with highly skilled colleagues.
Some of the tasks you will be working with involve:
Identifying and understanding the needs of both the customer and the product organisation through close dialogue
Using data to create value for our customers
Developing, coding and implementing BI/data science solutions
Cleaning and analysing data, and implementing and developing machine learning models
Facilitating workshops and building data models that support domains, user behaviour and software
Being part of a dynamic working environment characterised by collaboration, development and quality.

You can expect to work with a range of technologies, such as Microsoft Power BI, Python, Azure Cloud, Microsoft SQL Server, T-SQL, Microsoft SSIS and SSAS, data warehousing, data modelling and analysis.
High level of interdisciplinary expertise and collaboration

4433061857,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/journalist-at-folkekirken-4433061857?position=5&pageNum=12&refId=pQ%2BVDNtURBX4N64y7XRUAg%3D%3D&trackingId=EXdtgFfExCaoQLni%2FrWdLQ%3D%3D,Journalist,Folkekirken,"Aarhus Municipality, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Kan du udvikle stærkt indhold og skabe opmærksomhed om det?

Folkekirken leder efter en kreativ kommunikatør, der vil være med til at styrke folkekirkens synlighed og relevans gennem stærk formidling og opsøgende pressearbejde. Så drømmer du om et job med plads til både strategisk tænkning, kreativ udvikling og journalistisk fordybelse, er det måske lige netop dig, vi mangler på folkekirken.dks redaktion i Åbyhøj.
Om jobbet

Folkekirken.dk er folkekirkens nationale kommunikationsafdeling, og vi arbejder for at gøre folkekirken nærværende og tilgængelig for mennesker i hele landet. Vores mål er ikke at få folk til at gå i kirke hver søndag eller melde sig ind, men at nå mennesker, der sjældent bruger kirken, med kommunikation, der giver mening og skaber værdi i deres liv. Det gør vi gennem sociale medier, artikler, podcasts, video og ved at bringe folkekirkens historier ind i den offentlige samtale.
Hvad søger vi?

Vi søger kreativ journalist eller kommunikationsuddannet, der kan udvikle historier og få dem ud at leve. Du skal kunne omsætte komplekse emner til indhold, der engagerer forskellige målgrupper og samtidig have blik for, hvordan historier kan skabe opmærksomhed i medierne.

Du får blandt andet hovedansvaret for vores presseindsats. Derfor skal du kunne spotte historier med nyhedsværdi, udvikle vinkler og samarbejde med journalister og redaktioner om at bringe folkekirkens perspektiver i spil. Derudover kan du komme til at arbejde med idéudvikling, artikelskrivning, sociale medier, video, podcast, kampagner og strategi.
Hvad kan vi tilbyde?

Du bliver en del af et lille, ambitiøst team, hvor vi udvikler idéer og koncepter i fællesskab, sparrer tæt med hinanden og samarbejder med kolleger i hele folkekirken. Du får stor indflydelse på dit arbejde og en hverdag med varierede opgaver.
Vi arbejder fleksibelt med to faste ugentlige hjemmearbejdsdage og opgaver rundt om i landet. Derfor er det vigtigt, at du både trives med selvstændigt ansvar og tæt samarbejde.
Hos os vægter vi arbejdsglæde, faglig udvikling og kvalitet højt. Vi prioriterer tid til fordybelse og følger løbende udviklingen på digitale platforme og i mediebilledet.
Hvem er du?

Vi forestiller os, at du har erfaring med journalistik, kommunikation eller indholdsproduktion fra et medie, en organisation eller en virksomhed. Du er en stærk formidler, der kan omsætte strategiske mål til relevant og engagerende indhold på tværs af kanaler og platforme. Du skriver levende, nærværende og troværdigt til forskellige målgrupper og forstår, hvordan indhold skal tilpasses både sociale medier, hjemmeside og presseindsatser.
Derudover har du teknisk forståelse og erfaring med CMS, arbejder struktureret og tager ansvar for dine opgaver.
Hvem er vi?

Folkekirken.dk har til opgave at kommunikere det fælles folkekirkelige til offentligheden. Gennem folkekirkens officielle digitale kanaler og indsatser skaber vi indsigt, inspiration og samtale om tro, liv, kultur og samfund.

Vi arbejder for at synliggøre folkekirken som trossamfund, kulturbærer og aktør i civilsamfundet og for at fortælle historier om mennesker, fællesskaber og skabe samtaler om de spørgsmål, der optager os som mennesker.
Ansættelse og løn
Folkekirken.dk har kontor i Aarhus, hvor vi deler adresse med Folkekirkens IT. Stillingen er på fuld tid, og løn- og ansættelsesvilkår følger gældende overenskomst.
Har du spørgsmål til stillingen, er du velkommen til at kontakte redaktør Ellen Aagaard på eap@km.dk.
Ansøgning
Din ansøgning skal indeholde:
Ansøgning
CV
Dokumentation for uddannelse
Eksempel på en tekst eller anden produktion fra din hånd
Ansøgningsfristen er den onsdag d. 5.8. kl. 12.
Send din ansøgning her til ansogningerfolkekirkendk@km.dk
Vi forventer at afholde samtaler i uge 34.

4429543117,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-engineer-at-lind-capital-4429543117?position=9&pageNum=12&refId=pQ%2BVDNtURBX4N64y7XRUAg%3D%3D&trackingId=lsscFyW8KGwbSDqlA2t7QQ%3D%3D,Data Engineer,Lind Capital,"Aarhus, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","DATA ENGINEER
Build the data and AI foundation behind real trading and risk decisions, on a genuinely modern data stack.
Who we are

Lind Capital is a proprietary trading company focused on the financial markets. We combine market expertise, cutting-edge technology, data-driven decisions, and quantitative models to execute the best possible trades.

We bring together talented people from diverse backgrounds in an informal work environment focused on creating results together. We empower our team to make decisions and prefer direct collaboration over bureaucracy.
Our diverse team of 25+ are based in Aarhus, Denmark.
The role
Data and AI are central to Lind Capital’s success and key to our future growth, and we are looking to add to our data team that currently consists of six Data and ML Engineers.

We run a modern data stack centered on Python (incl. Polars), Airflow, Parquet and Apache Iceberg, with Athena, Postgres, Kafka, and more in the mix. In this role, you’ll turn structured and unstructured data into trusted, well-modeled datasets that power production applications, analytics, and reporting — while helping us expand reliability, performance, and capabilities across our Data Lakehouse.

You won't just feed data to AI applications — you'll help build them. You'll work in a team that actively experiments with AI across both agentic engineering and agentic workflows — from AI-assisted development to the internal AI tooling we develop ourselves.
Key responsibilities
Collaborate closely with trading and risk professionals to define data needs and translate them into durable datasets and interfaces.
Design, build, and operate batch and streaming pipelines in our cloud-based Data Lakehouse.
Use AI-assisted development tools fluently and help build the data foundations and internal tooling that let AI and ML systems work reliably and safely against our data.
Implement data quality checks and improve pipeline observability (monitoring, alerting, and fast debugging when things break).
What we offer
A genuinely modern data stack where the data products and AI tools you build visibly drive live investment and risk decisions — real impact, at a firm small enough that it shows.
Close mentorship from six experienced Data and ML Engineers, with the support and code reviews to help you level up quickly.
A culture grounded in quantitative thinking, curiosity, and experimentation.
A dynamic environment that balances a disciplined approach to data pipelines with the freedom to innovate.
An inclusive, caring, and psychologically safe workplace where diverse perspectives, ideas, and approaches lead to high performance.
What we are looking for
Some hands-on experience with Data or Software Engineering — through work, internships, or your own projects. We care more about how you think than years on a CV.
Strong Python engineering skills (e.g. clean code, tests, packaging).
Solid SQL, and a working understanding of data stores for both transactional and analytical workloads.
Comfort with Git and good engineering habits — testing, CI/CD, and code review.
Genuine interest in working with AI tools day-to-day — both using them to ship faster and thinking critically about where they help and where they don’t.
A strong communicator and team player who thrives in a cross-functional team.
We value potential over perfect match, and we encourage you to apply even if you don't meet all the above. We consider candidates across experience levels.
Location
We support flexible working arrangements
column2: however, success in this role depends on close collaboration, which works best when colleagues are physically together. You should therefore expect to work most of the time from our Aarhus office. Our working language is English, and we welcome applications from non-Danish speakers.

column1: Benefits
Professional development and clear career growth opportunities.
Competitive compensation and employee shares.
Good maternity/paternity terms.
Modern office environment with a healthy canteen and snacks.
Visa support (if needed).
The practical stuff
Start date: As soon as possible.
To apply, please submit your CV, grade transcript, cover letter, and other relevant documents via the link below.
Applications will be processed on a rolling basis.

4431371348,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-trainer-freelance-data-annotator-at-toloka-annotators-4431371348?position=1&pageNum=15&refId=kUDm3RwB6rKd6I7YIKF0OA%3D%3D&trackingId=B7V7X%2FKOX1R7iiTSQQ8pAw%3D%3D,AI Trainer - Freelance Data Annotator,Toloka Annotators,Denmark,"Please submit your resume in English and indicate your level of English.
At Toloka, we connect smart, curious people from around the world with freelance online tasks that train and improve artificial intelligence.
What We Do

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.
About The Role

Annotation is what helps AI make sense of the world. As an annotator, you may be invited to take part in online projects such as rating AI-generated content, evaluating factual accuracy, or comparing responses - when projects are available.
Responsibilities:
Carefully review provided data (text, images, or videos)
Label or classify content based on project guidelines
Identify and flag factually incorrect, sensitive, inappropriate, or unclear material

At Toloka, we connect smart, curious people from around the world with freelance online tasks that train and improve artificial intelligence.

What We Do

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.

About The Role

Annotation is what helps AI make sense of the world. As an annotator, you may be invited to take part in online projects such as rating AI-generated content, evaluating factual accuracy, or comparing responses - when projects are available.

Responsibilities:

  • Carefully review provided data (text, images, or videos)
  • Label or classify content based on project guidelines
  • Identify and flag factually incorrect, sensitive, inappropriate, or unclear material

  • Logical thinking, fact-checking and reasoning abilities

4433822164,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/it-support-at-forsvarets-efterretningstjeneste-fe-4433822164?position=5&pageNum=15&refId=kUDm3RwB6rKd6I7YIKF0OA%3D%3D&trackingId=Byfx7oOIAikVAV3m3sHHrg%3D%3D,IT-support,Forsvarets Efterretningstjeneste (FE),"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","FE søger en medarbejder med is i maven til vores ComCenter

Kunne du tænke dig at blive en del af livsnerven i en af Vestens mest dynamiske efterretningstjenester? Forsvarets Efterretningstjenestes døgnbemandede ComCenter søger en ny medarbejder, der kan holde hovedet koldt i pressede situationer – også midt om natten. Hvis du har teknisk snilde, er serviceminded og har du lysten til at arbejde i et miljø, hvor dit arbejde gør en forskel for Danmarks sikkerhed, så send din ansøgning i dag og bliv en vigtig brik i Danmarks efterretningsarbejde
Du får udfordringer og plads til at udvikle dig
Du vil blive en del af vores ComCenter, som løser opgaver døgnet rund
t.ComCenterets hovedopgave er at modtage og sende elektronisk kommunikation ind og ud af FE på vegne af medarbejderne i forretningen, og du vil først og fremmest komme til at varetage den opgave.
Du vil dog også have andre opgaver f.eks. at yde 1st‑level IT-support til kolleger i FE og behandle og løse sager i vores ITSM‑system.

Stillingen henvender sig til dig, der har IT‑tekniske og administrative evner, og som har mod på skiftende arbejdstider, hvor du nogle gange arbejder, når andre har fri, og har fri, når andre arbejder. Vi lærer dig alt, hvad du skal vide for at udføre arbejdet, så du er klar til ansvaret i ComCenteret, når du er på vagt.

ComCenteret er bemandet alle døgnets 24 timer året rundt – også i weekender og på helligdage. Du kommer til at indgå i en fast vagtturnus, hvor alle medarbejdere skiftes til at arbejde inden for normal arbejdstid, om natten samt i weekender.
Du og din baggrund er vigtig
Vi forestiller os, at du har en grundlæggende IT‑ eller administrativ uddannelse. Måske er du nyuddannet IT‑supporter, eller du har opnået stærke IT‑færdigheder på anden vis.
For at få succes i jobbet er det vigtigt,
at du
column2: er et ordensmenneske, der hellere dobbelttjekker en gang for meget end en gang for lidt.

column1: Arbejder omhyggeligt, struktureret og kan opretholde momentum – også på nattevagt.
Tager ansvar for løsning af opgaverne og har mod til at påtage sig dette ansvar, når du er alene på vagt efter oplæringsperioden.
Har en bred, grundlæggende IT‑viden og er i stand til at formidle den til andre.
Er serviceorienteret og finder glæde i at hjælpe andre.
Trives med varierede opgaver, hvor der både er gentagne rutineopgaver og mere komplekse opgaver. Er selvstændig og trives med at træffe beslutninger.
Trives med skiftende arbejdstider, der spænder over alle ugens syv dage og alle døgnets 24 timer.
Din nye arbejdsplads
Forsvarets Efterretningstjeneste (FE) er Danmarks udenrigsefterretningstjeneste og arbejder – hemmeligt og åbent – for at beskytte Danmark og danske interesser i en foranderlig

verden.Vi er ikke alene om at beskytte Danmark, men vi er den eneste myndighed, der har fået mandat til at udnytte helt særlige midler til at afdække, hvad andre stater og udenlandske aktører forsøger at holde hemmeligt. Det giver mening for os at bidrage til fred, tryghed og sikkerhed for danskerne, både i den analoge og i den digitale verden og det gør vi ved at afdække, vurdere, rådgive om og modvirke både aktuelle trusler og trusler under udvikling.

Vi værdsætter styrken i vores mangfoldighed med dybe fagligheder og specialister og vi er en helt speciel og operativt orienteret vidensorganisation, der har mange forskellige opgaver, men fælles for dem alle er det vidensgrundlag, som vores efterretningsarbejde skaber.
Din lønpakke afhænger af dine kvalifikationer

Løn- og ansættelsesvilkår er i henhold til overenskomst mellem Finansministeriet og den relevante faglige organisation, afhængig af din uddannelsesmæssige baggrund. Derudover har du mulighed for at forhandle løntillæg efter kvalifikationer. Den gennemsnitlige arbejdstid er 37 timer om ugen inklusiv betalt frokostpause. Til stillingen hører en pensionsordning, som FE betaler. Som ansat i FE er du omfattet af nogle særlige vilkår. Det er et krav, at du kan sikkerhedsgodkendes og opretholde sikkerhedsgodkendelsen under hele din ansættelse. Som i resten af forsvaret har du pligt til kortvarig udsendelse til udlandet.
Sådan søger du
Du skal sende din ansøgning og CV via stillingsopslaget, senest den 31-07-2026.
Søg via LINK
Vi forventer, at de indledende ansættelsessamtaler vil finde sted i uge 32-33 og stiler mod en ansættelse fra 1. oktober 2026. Vi opfordrer alle interesserede uanset personlig baggrund til at søge
stillingen.
Du er velkommen til at kontakte den lokale HR-partner på 22659@ddis.dk, hvis du har spørgsmål til stillingen eller ønsker flere oplysninger.

Du kan også læse mere på www.fe-ddis.dk, hvor du blandt andet finder vores beretning ”INDBLIK”, hvor du bl.a. kan få oplysninger om FE´s opgaver, FE som arbejdsplads og yderligere information om ansættelsesmæssige forhold.
Vi glæder os til at modtage din ansøgning.

4436325201,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/volunteer-at-united-media-4436325201?position=6&pageNum=15&refId=kUDm3RwB6rKd6I7YIKF0OA%3D%3D&trackingId=508e6Pen65fORB%2B1Ch8Iog%3D%3D,Volunteer,United Media,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Do you want to expand your network with 4,500+ leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, celebrities and politicians plus develop your skills in leadership? Now is your chance!

We offer the opportunity to join the 2025 Presidents Summit Volunteer Programme. We are looking for ambitious and talented people, who want to be a part of a team of 100+ peers and help us build, run and deliver Northern Europe’s leading business event.

On 10th and 11th June, we will host the largest Presidents Summit in Copenhagen to date, when we welcome 4,500+ leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, celebrities and politicians, along with 25+ of the world's leading speakers. To give you an example of our previous speakers, we had Steve Wozniak (Co-founder of Apple), Bill Clinton, Richard Branson (Founder of The Virgin Group), Joe Gebbia (Co-founder of Airbnb) and Dr. Frederik Pferdt (Google´s Chief Innovation Evangelist).
You can get a better sense of the conference, in last year’s highlight video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fnrr5j1oWx4
PROFESSIONAL BENEFITS:
Expand your network with 4,500+ business leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, and politicians.
Create your next business opportunity & meet your new mentor
Develop your soft skills and receive individual training in management from the Presidents Summit Team
Receive the official 2025 Presidents Summit Volunteer LinkedIn Certificate
PERSONAL BENEFITS:
Take part in the 2025 Presidents Summit Workshop, along with 100+ ambitious and talented people and learn the insights of running Presidents Summit and the possibilities that this entails
Experience the unique atmosphere of Presidents Summit over the two days of the conference.
Gain valuable knowledge, insights, and inspiration by listening and chatting to the world's leading speakers.
Seize the opportunity to develop your competencies in communication and learn what it takes to create the leading event in Europe.
SOCIAL BENEFITS
Create personal relationships with like-minded, hardworking professionals from the Volunteer Programme and from the Presidents Summit team.
Exclusive access to the official 2025 Presidents Summit After Party for all members of the Volunteer Programme.
The conference will take place on the 10th and 11th June in Copenhagen.
Hours to contribute: 2 days of the conference (shift-based) plus 2.5 working days of training & rehearsals in two weeks leading up to it.

If you are interested in being part of this amazing team and help us with the organisation and delivery of the conference, please apply with your CV and fill the box answering the question: Why do you want to be part of Presidents Summit 2025.
We are looking forward to working together!

4431226791,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ipsos-is-seeking-a-research-intern-and-a-business-design-intern-for-our-qualitative-market-research-team-at-ipsos-4431226791?position=10&pageNum=15&refId=kUDm3RwB6rKd6I7YIKF0OA%3D%3D&trackingId=45asfw7yF5G12TAdWoL2VA%3D%3D,Ipsos is seeking a Research Intern and a Business Design Intern for our qualitative market research team,Ipsos,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Job Description
Ipsos is seeking a Research Intern and a Business Design Intern for our qualitative market research team

Are you curious about the market research industry and looking for a challenging internship in the Fall of 2027? Would you like to become part of a committed professional community of talented analysts and consultants dedicated to understanding and supporting our clients' challenges?
Join our internship program if you're a student seeking hands-on experience in the market research industry with Ipsos Denmark's qualitative team beginning in August/September 2026.
Use market research as the foundation to develop our clients’ businesses

At Ipsos our mission is to deliver reliable information for a true understanding of society, markets, and people. We aim to deliver actionable insights that make our world easier for our clients to navigate and thrive in.

As an intern, you will become part of our qualitative team, where we are interested in understanding the behaviour, attitudes, and motives of a specific target group. Like our full-time employees, you will work alongside our specialized consultants who help our global clients such as LEGO, Novonesis, Velux, Carlsberg with product development and identify development opportunities for their brands.
Read more about our qualitative team here: Our solutions | Ipsos
Our two different intern opportunities in our qualitative team

If Ipsos sounds interesting to you, you can apply for an internship as either a Research Intern or a Business Design Intern for our qualitative team. Please let us know your preference at the top of your application.
Research Intern - As a research intern you will gain practical experience with:
Conducting fieldwork such as interviews, observations, and note-taking in connection with focus groups
Assisting in the qualitative analysis and preparation of insights and recommendations to the client
Participating in the preparation of client-oriented reports, presentations, and reporting of qualitative data

Typically, you will work in a team of three on a given project, consisting of you, a consultant, and a project manager. You will have your own independent tasks and will therefore play an important role in the execution of each project.
As a research intern you will succeed in the job if...
You are passionate about understanding other people's behaviour and motives through your analytical skills
You can work independently and take ownership of qualitative projects and tasks
You are service-minded and understand what it takes to deliver the best and most insightful deliveries to our customers
You are proficient and comfortable working in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint

It is a plus you are studying a business-oriented program with a strong methodological background or similar, which has given you knowledge of market analysis and has solid methodological competencies. Job Description

Ipsos is seeking a Research Intern and a Business Design Intern for our qualitative market research team

Are you curious about the market research industry and looking for a challenging internship in the Fall of 2027? Would you like to become part of a committed professional community of talented analysts and consultants dedicated to understanding and supporting our clients' challenges?

Join our internship program if you're a student seeking hands-on experience in the market research industry with Ipsos Denmark's qualitative team beginning in August/September 2026.

Use market research as the foundation to develop our clients’ businesses

At Ipsos our mission is to deliver reliable information for a true understanding of society, markets, and people. We aim to deliver actionable insights that make our world easier for our clients to navigate and thrive in.

As an intern, you will become part of our qualitative team, where we are interested in understanding the behaviour, attitudes, and motives of a specific target group. Like our full-time employees, you will work alongside our specialized consultants who help our global clients such as LEGO, Novonesis, Velux, Carlsberg with product development and identify development opportunities for their brands.

Read more about our qualitative team here: Our solutions | Ipsos

Our two different intern opportunities in our qualitative team

If Ipsos sounds interesting to you, you can apply for an internship as either a Research Intern or a Business Design Intern for our qualitative team. Please let us know your preference at the top of your application.

Research Intern - As a research intern you will gain practical experience with:

  • Conducting fieldwork such as interviews, observations, and note-taking in connection with focus groups
  • Assisting in the qualitative analysis and preparation of insights and recommendations to the client
  • Participating in the preparation of client-oriented reports, presentations, and reporting of qualitative data

Typically, you will work in a team of three on a given project, consisting of you, a consultant, and a project manager. You will have your own independent tasks and will therefore play an important role in the execution of each project.

As a research intern you will succeed in the job if...

  • You are passionate about understanding other people's behaviour and motives through your analytical skills
  • You can work independently and take ownership of qualitative projects and tasks
  • You are service-minded and understand what it takes to deliver the best and most insightful deliveries to our customers
  • You are proficient and comfortable working in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint

It is a plus you are studying a business-oriented program with a strong methodological background or similar, which has given you knowledge of market analysis and has solid methodological competencies. Ideally, you are an anthropologist, sociologist, or perhaps something completely different, and you are passionate about solving and driving qualitative analysis tasks.

Business Designer Intern

By embedding a business designer within our team, we're not just adding another role, we're injecting a creative powerhouse who can elevate our projects to new heights.

As a Business Designer Intern, you will succeed in the job if...

  • You possess a creative mindset, enabling you to deliver strong creative messages and content creation through visualization.
  • You bring our projects to life with awesome illustrations that spark creativity and add visual flair through visualization programs such as InDesign, Photoshop, and Illustrator
  • You possess video editing skills, which enable you to contribute to client presentations
  • You are proficient and comfortable working in PowerPoint, as we create many of our reports and proposal through PowerPoint.

Enjoy a Hybrid Work Model Combining In-office And Remote Flexibility. Benefit From Professional Development Through Our Ipsos Academy, And Engage In Diverse Social Activities Within Our Energy Program – You Will Have Access To It All, And…

  • A blended learning approach with emphasis on learning-on-the-job supported by tailored training sessions, webinars, and a being part of a feedback culture
  • Access to Cutting-edge AI Tools: You will gain hands-on experience with our bespoke AI tools and industry-leading solutions to enhance your analytical and decision-making skills
  • Participate in our Intern Community spending time with other interns to inspire and share learnings
  • 5-month internship
  • Monthly compensation of DKK 3770
  • Free lunch and social activities
  • Potential for permanent employment

Hvor: København eller Aarhus
Hvornår: Hurtigst muligt

Vil du være den person, der får Pitayas content til at stå skarpt, hænge sammen og blive brugt rigtigt på tværs af SoMe, butikker, events og kampagner? Vi leder efter en Content Editor & Coordinator, der kan tage ansvar for at redigere, strukturere, organisere og videreudvikle det content, vi skaber.
Det her er rollen for dig, der elsker visuelt content, SoMe, grafik, æstetik og struktur.
Om rollen
Som Content Editor & Coordinator bliver du en vigtig del af vores marketing- og contentteam:
Redigere det content, vi får ind fra shoots, events, influencers og butikker
Organisere vores content struktureret, så det er nemt at finde og genbruge
Lave grafik til butikker, SoMe, events og kampagner
Sparre med teamet ud fra tidligere learnings og performance
Skyde content med både mobil og kamera, når der er behov
Du refererer til Head of Marketing og arbejder tæt sammen med Founder, Event Coordinator, Influencer Manager, Content Creator og resten af marketingteamet.
Din profil
Er du den rette kandidat, kan du nikke genkendende til følgende:
Har erfaring med at redigere video og billeder til sociale medier
Er god til at skabe struktur og holde overblik over store mængder materiale
Kan lave grafisk materiale til forskellige kanaler og formater
Har blik for, hvad der fungerer visuelt på Instagram, TikTok og Reels
Kan skyde content med både mobil og kamera
Kan tage feedback og omsætte learnings til bedre materiale
Vi tilbyder dig
En central contentrolle i et ungt dansk fashionbrand i vækst
Ansvar for at redigere, strukturere og organisere Pitayas content
Mulighed for at arbejde med SoMe, events, butikker, kampagner, shoots og grafik
Tæt samarbejde med Founder, Head of Marketing og resten af marketingteamet
Korte beslutningsveje og mulighed for at sætte dit præg på Pitayas contentflow
Kontorplads i enten København eller Aarhus, opstart hurtigst muligt
Send gerne eksempler på content, du har redigeret eller grafik, du har lavet. Lønniveau fastsættes ud fra erfaring. Ansøgningsfrist 19/07.
Om PITAYA

PITAYA er en dansk modevirksomhed med rødder i Aarhus, skabt ud fra en passion for personlig stil, fællesskab og kompromisløs kundeservice. Vi tilbyder mode, accessories og must-haves til den moderne kvinde med et skarpt fokus på æstetik, autenticitet og nærvær.
Hos PITAYA er vi ikke bare kollegaer. Vi er et team af ildsjæle, der hver dag arbejder målrettet for at skabe en unik oplevelse for vores kunder og en arbejdsplads, vi er stolte af.
Vi sørger for en grundig oplæring og opstart, så du får de bedste forudsætninger for at lykkes. Lyder det som noget for dig, så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.
Send din ansøgning eller LinkedIn-profil til job@pitaya.dk sammen med et par linjer om, hvorfor rollen har fanget din interesse.
De bedste hilsner,
TEAM PITAYA

4425614290,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/executive-assistant-at-caljan-4425614290?position=5&pageNum=17&refId=04IeCbWFppIWYjox8ZNAwA%3D%3D&trackingId=wTLs6gUBgmig6KHSutLexw%3D%3D,Executive Assistant,CALJAN,"Aarhus, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Executive Assistant to the CEO
Do you enjoy being where things happen? Are you someone who creates structure, keeps momentum going, and brings calm and clarity into a busy environment?

At Caljan, we are looking for an Executive Assistant to the CEO who will become a trusted partner to our Chief Executive and play an important role in supporting both the day-to-day rhythm and the broader priorities of the CEO office.

This is a role for someone who thrives in a fast-moving setting and enjoys working close to decision-making. You will help create focus, coordinate across people and priorities, and ensure that important matters move forward with the right level of quality, professionalism, and follow-through.
About Caljan

Caljan has been helping shape logistics handling since 1963 and today supports customers around the world with automation solutions that improve efficiency, safety, and workflow in parcel and logistics operations.
From our headquarters in Hasselager, Denmark, we work across multiple markets and continue to grow our international footprint, our technologies, and our service offering.

We are on an exciting journey. In recent years, Caljan has continued to evolve through innovation, international expansion, and a stronger focus on automation, digitalisation, and aftermarket services. At the same time, we remain grounded in a practical, down-to-earth culture where quality, collaboration, and continuous improvement matter.
Joining Caljan means becoming part of a company with strong roots, global ambition, and a clear sense of direction.
About The Role

As Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will work at the heart of the business. You will support the CEO across a wide range of activities, from planning, coordination, and communication to reporting, presentations, and executive follow-up.

This is much more than a traditional support role. We are looking for someone who can combine strong organisational skills with business understanding, analytical capability, and the confidence to work with senior stakeholders across functions and countries.
You will be a key part of making sure the CEO office runs smoothly and effectively, while also helping bring structure and momentum to strategic and executive-level priorities.
What you will be doing
In this role, you will:
prepare presentations, board material, executive summaries, and briefing packs of a consistently high standard
help turn complex business information and reporting into clear and useful decision support
support the CEO in board-related, investor-related, and leadership-related activities
coordinate input from senior leaders and ensure executive material is aligned, accurate, and well structured
manage internal and external communication on behalf of the CEO with the right tone and professionalism
act as a central coordination point across senior stakeholders, functions, and countries
support leadership meetings, workshops, and off-sites with strong preparation and clear follow-up
take ownership of calendar management, travel planning, meeting logistics, and related administration
track actions, priorities, and key initiatives to ensure progress and follow-through
proactively anticipate needs, solve problems, and remove practical barriers
Who we are looking for

We are looking for someone who is both highly professional and easy to work with. Someone who is proactive, structured, and comfortable operating in a demanding executive environment. You know when to take initiative, when to challenge constructively, and when discretion matters most.
You are likely someone who enjoys creating order, has a natural eye for detail, and can move confidently between practical coordination and more strategic support.
We imagine that you bring:
solid experience as an Executive Assistant at senior executive level, ideally supporting a CEO or similar
experience preparing board or executive-level presentations, reports, and communication material
strong business understanding and confidence working with reporting, management information, and data
advanced Excel skills and the ability to work with reporting packs, trends, and analysis
experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools is an advantage
very strong written and verbal communication skills
excellent PowerPoint and presentation skills
a structured and proactive approach with strong follow-up discipline
the ability to manage multiple priorities while keeping quality and professionalism high
experience from an international or multi-country environment
As a person, you are
proactive and solutions-oriented
structured and dependable
analytically strong
calm under pressure
trustworthy and discreet
comfortable with pace, complexity, and changing priorities
collaborative and confident working across cultures and seniority levels
Why join us?

This is a unique opportunity to work closely with the CEO in a role with real visibility and impact. You will gain insight into executive decision-making, work across a broad range of business topics, and help shape the effectiveness of the CEO office in a meaningful way.

You will join a company that combines a strong heritage with a forward-looking mindset and a business that is continuing to grow, innovate, and strengthen its position in logistics automation globally.
Location
The position is based at the HQ in Hasselager, Denmark

4436332972,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/paid-specialist-at-shark-co-reklamebureau-4436332972?position=6&pageNum=17&refId=04IeCbWFppIWYjox8ZNAwA%3D%3D&trackingId=%2FRGUeU6fsYOo4vsj4ADaUw%3D%3D,Paid Specialist,Shark & Co. Reklamebureau,"Horsens, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Får du et kick af at skabe konverteringer og målbare resultater, der vækster kundernes forretning? Well, look no further! Vi søger en knivskarp specialist til at drive og skalere vores kunders annoncering på tværs af Paid Search og Social.
Om stillingen

Som Paid Specialist kommer du til at spille en afgørende rolle i at sikre vores kunders digitale succes. Du vil få overdraget nøglerne til det maskinrum, hvor vi skaber magien bag vores kunders vækst. Og som en central spiller i vores team får du ansvaret for opsætning, strategi, optimering og monitorering af kampagner. Dine primære legepladser bliver Google Ads, Meta og LinkedIn.

Du får en hverdag, hvor du arbejder tæt sammen med både kollegaer og kunder. Derfor er det vigtigt, at du ikke kun er en haj til at nørde i platformene, men at du også kan formidle dine strategier og resultater på en letforståelig måde. Jobbet indebærer, at du med overskud og faglig tyngde kan rådgive om den bedste vej frem til fx kundemøder, briefs, pitches og afrapporteringsmøder.
Dit ansvarsområde dækker bl.a. over:
Strategisk eksekvering: Du skal kunne definere og implementere effektive strategier på tværs af Paid Search og Paid Social.
Kampagneopsætning og optimering: Opsætte, monitorere og optimere kampagner på Google Ads, Meta og LinkedIn for at drive trafik, skaffe leads og forbedre ROI.

Tætte kundesamarbejder: Deltagelse i kundemøder, briefs, pitches og afrapporteringsmøder. Du skal være en dygtig kommunikatør, som kan sætte dig ind i kundernes behov og formidle komplekse data, så alle forstår det.
En holistisk tilgang: Forståelse for, hvordan de forskellige kanaler spiller sammen i kunderejsen og understøtter hinanden bedst muligt.
Udvikling: At holde dig opdateret på de nyeste tendenser og muligheder inden for platformene.

AI og automatisering: Du har en naturlig nysgerrighed for, hvad AI og automatisering kan gøre for vores arbejde. Det kan være alt fra AI-drevne budstrategier og kreativoptimering til at bygge smarte workflows, der frigiver tid til det, der virkelig rykker.
Din Profil

Vores drømmescenarie er, at du har solid erfaring inden for både PPC (Google Ads) og Paid Social (særligt Meta og LinkedIn). Er du derimod en sand mester inden for ét af områderne og har mod på at lære det andet, hører vi også meget gerne fra dig!
Vi forventer, at du:
Har 3+ års erfaring fra en lignende rolle, gerne fra bureau eller e-commerce.
Har stærke tekniske færdigheder i Google Ads, Meta Business Manager og LinkedIn Campaign Manager.
Er analytisk stærk og vant til at træffe strategiske beslutninger baseret på data.
Har kommerciel forståelse og brænder for at skabe vækst for dine kunder.

Er nysgerrig på AI og de muligheder, det åbner op for i vores fag. Du behøver ikke at have alle svarene, men du kaster dig gerne ud i at eksperimentere med nye AI-drevne flows, værktøjer og arbejdsmetoder.
Er detaljeorienteret og har en høj faglig stolthed.
Trives i en udadvendt rolle med meget kundekontakt.
Det får du hos Shark & Co.

Du kan glæde dig til en hverdag i et inspirerende miljø med afvekslende opgaver og et stærkt hold af gode og støttende kollegaer i ryggen – både i onlineafdelingen og på tværs af resten af bureauet. Vi vægter faglig sparring højt, og der er altid plads til både fokus og fis. Ingen rundsave på albuerne her. Til gengæld har vi fadølsanlæg, frugtordning og en nerf gun-væg, som sikrer, at hverdagen ikke bliver for kedelig.

Og så er vi gode til at holde fester og til at fejre succeser og mærkedage med morgenbrød, kage eller spontane fællesfrokoster. En gang i mellem tager vi også en tur ud af huset – nogle gange på jagt efter ny inspiration, andre gange bare fordi.

Derudover får du en arbejdsplads, hvor forretningsudvikling og effektfuld marketing er en holdsport – og en arbejdsplads, som oprigtigt kerer sig om sine kunder. Derfor gør vi meget ud af at kommunikere i hjertehøjde, investere i langsigtede kunderelationer og være transparente i vores samarbejder. Du kan se mere om vores kompetencer, cases og kunder på sharkogco.dk.
Ansøg
Send din ansøgning hurtigst muligt til job@sharkogco.dk. Vi inviterer løbende til samtale, så tøv ikke med at sende din ansøgning.
Har du spørgsmål til stillingen, er du velkommen til at kontakte Sarah Nathalie Fabrin Mejlstrup, partner og Chief Digital Marketing Officer, på 60 54 51 65 / sarah@sharkogco.dk.
Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig!

4436317682,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/internship-volunteer-at-united-media-4436317682?position=10&pageNum=17&refId=04IeCbWFppIWYjox8ZNAwA%3D%3D&trackingId=ivcrlFa%2FB%2FtK8n2yQ9N5UA%3D%3D,Internship Volunteer,United Media,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Do you want to expand your network with 4,500+ leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, celebrities and politicians plus develop your skills in leadership? Now is your chance!

We offer the opportunity to join the 2025 Presidents Summit Volunteer Programme. We are looking for ambitious and talented people, who want to be a part of a team of 100+ peers and help us build, run and deliver Northern Europe’s leading business event.

On 10th and 11th June, we will host the largest Presidents Summit in Copenhagen to date, when we welcome 4,500+ leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, celebrities and politicians, along with 25+ of the world's leading speakers. To give you an example of our previous speakers, we had Steve Wozniak (Co-founder of Apple), Bill Clinton, Richard Branson (Founder of The Virgin Group), Joe Gebbia (Co-founder of Airbnb) and Dr. Frederik Pferdt (Google´s Chief Innovation Evangelist).
You can get a better sense of the conference, in last year’s highlight video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fnrr5j1oWx4
PROFESSIONAL BENEFITS:
Expand your network with 4,500+ business leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, and politicians.
Create your next business opportunity & meet your new mentor
Develop your soft skills and receive individual training in management from the Presidents Summit Team
Receive the official 2025 Presidents Summit Volunteer LinkedIn Certificate
PERSONAL BENEFITS:
Take part in the 2025 Presidents Summit Workshop, along with 100+ ambitious and talented people and learn the insights of running Presidents Summit and the possibilities that this entails
Experience the unique atmosphere of Presidents Summit over the two days of the conference.
Gain valuable knowledge, insights, and inspiration by listening and chatting to the world's leading speakers.
Seize the opportunity to develop your competencies in communication and learn what it takes to create the leading event in Europe.
SOCIAL BENEFITS
Create personal relationships with like-minded, hardworking professionals from the Volunteer Programme and from the Presidents Summit team.
Exclusive access to the official 2025 Presidents Summit After Party for all members of the Volunteer Programme.
The conference will take place on the 10th and 11th June in Copenhagen.
Hours to contribute: 2 days of the conference (shift-based) plus 2.5 working days of training & rehearsals in two weeks leading up to it.

If you are interested in being part of this amazing team and help us with the organisation and delivery of the conference, please apply with your CV and fill the box answering the question: Why do you want to be part of Presidents Summit 2025.
We are looking forward to working together!

4432436539,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ungarbejder-7-timer-viby-j-at-lidl-danmark-4432436539?position=1&pageNum=20&refId=O9gRez0rDXIK3rl2Wn2edA%3D%3D&trackingId=uaYOPuVnIHrtr4MJyLvPig%3D%3D,Ungarbejder - 7 timer - Viby J,Lidl Danmark,"Aarhus, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Introduktion
Er du under 18 år? Og drømmer du om at få et job, der giver lidt ekstra penge til dig selv hver måned? Så er du måske vores nye ungarbejder!
På #teamlidl bliver du en del af et seriøst godt sammenhold. Og som ungarbejder i Lidl får du et Lidl-tillæg på 5 kr. mere i timen.*
Mød din nye kollega Katrine

”Jeg er så glad for at arbejde i Lidl! Her er plads til alle, og alle bliver hørt. Vi har et rigtig godt team, hvor alle er gode til at hjælpe hinanden. Selve arbejdsmiljøet består af gode kunder, søde kollegaer og en flot butik,” fortæller Katrine, der er 17 år gammel og ungarbejder i Lidl.
Kan du bidrage til godt humør, fællesskab og en god service? Så er det måske dig, vi står og mangler!

På #teamlidl kommer du på hold med verdensklasse kollegaer. Når du starter, klæder vi dig på gennem et grundigt oplæringsforløb i vores koncepter. Vi går nemlig op i, at du lærer tingene rigtigt fra start, at du lykkes i dit job, og at du bidrager til et stærkt sammenhold med dine kollegaer.
Grænseløse karrieremuligheder

Som ungarbejder er der mange forskellige udviklingsmuligheder hos os. Har du f.eks. ambitioner om at gøre karriere i dagligvarebranchen? Så er jobbet som ungarbejder det perfekte sted at starte. Din erfaring som ungarbejder vil nemlig kun være en fordel, hvis du senere ønsker at søge ind på vores elevuddannelse, som vi mener, er Danmarks suverænt bedste! Det er ligeledes en stor fordel at have butikserfaring, hvis du drømmer om at arbejde på vores hovedkontor.
Ift. den overenskomstmæssig takst pr. marts 2025.
Om jobbet

Som ungarbejder hos os skal du, først og fremmest, hjælpe dine kollegaer, så vores kunder altid får en god indkøbsoplevelse i butikken. Du ved, at du har gjort dit arbejde godt, når du har ydet en god service – og det gør dig glad! Dine opgaver er blandt andet at:
Give vores kunder en god oplevelse i butikken sammen med dine kollegaer
Få butikken til at shine, ved at fylde op og trimme hylderne så de altid står snorlige
Få varerne scannet hurtigt gennem kasseapparatet med et smil på læben
Svinge moppen, når gulvet er beskidt
Om dig
Når du starter i Lidl, får du en grundig oplæring i butikken. Derfor er det ikke afgørende for os, at du har erfaring, men vi forventer, at du:
Er under 18 år, dog ikke yngre end 15 år
Har afsluttet 9. klasse
Er smilende og har masser af god energi
Har gåpåmod, klør på og vægter teamspirit højt
Møder til tiden og er interesseret i at gøre dit arbejde godt
Har mulighed for at arbejde eftermiddag, aften og i weekenden
Vi tilbyder
Udover at du får verdensklasse kollegaer, får du som ungarbejder også:
Et Lidl-tillæg på 5 kr. mere i timen*
Et udbetalt tillæg i henhold til overenskomsten, når du arbejder på skæve tidspunkter - fx aftener, weekender og helligdage
Løn og vilkår efter gældende overenskomst med HK
Erfaring med at samarbejde i et team og erfaring med service - hvilket vil give dig en stor fordel i dit videre arbejdsliv
Fleksible arbejdstider, så du let kan kombinere jobbet med skole og fritidsaktiviteter
Et spændende og varieret job med fart over feltet!
Gode karrieremuligheder, hvor du får forudsætningerne for at lykkes
Rabatordning hos flere udbydere af rejser, shopping, kultur, fitness mm.
Vil du med på #teamlidl?
Nu ved du forhåbentlig endnu mere om #teamlidl og jobbet som ungarbejder, end du gjorde i forvejen! Er jobbet som ungarbejder i Lidl noget for dig? Så send dit motiverede CV allerede i dag!
Sådan søger du stillingen:
Klik på ”Søg nu”
Udfyld formularen
Vedhæft dit motiverede CV
Vi rekrutterer løbende, så send dit motiverede CV hurtigst muligt. Da butikken er åben alle ugens dage, vil der forekomme dag-, aften- og weekendarbejde.
Har du spørgsmål til stillingen eller ansøgningsprocessen, er du velkommen til at kontakte Recruiting på jobilidlvest@lidl.dk eller tlf. 7635 0535, mandag – torsdag 8.00 – 15.00/ fredag 08.00 – 14.00
Vi ser frem til at modtage dit CV!

”Jeg er så glad for at arbejde i Lidl! Her er plads til alle, og alle bliver hørt. Vi har et rigtig godt team, hvor alle er gode til at hjælpe hinanden. Selve arbejdsmiljøet består af gode kunder, søde kollegaer og en flot butik,” fortæller Katrine, der er 17 år gammel og ungarbejder i Lidl.

Kan du bidrage til godt humør, fællesskab og en god service? Så er det måske dig, vi står og mangler!

På #teamlidl kommer du på hold med verdensklasse kollegaer. Når du starter, klæder vi dig på gennem et grundigt oplæringsforløb i vores koncepter. Vi går nemlig op i, at du lærer tingene rigtigt fra start, at du lykkes i dit job, og at du bidrager til et stærkt sammenhold med dine kollegaer.

Grænseløse karrieremuligheder

Som ungarbejder er der mange forskellige udviklingsmuligheder hos os. Har du f.eks. ambitioner om at gøre karriere i dagligvarebranchen? Så er jobbet som ungarbejder det perfekte sted at starte. Din erfaring som ungarbejder vil nemlig kun være en fordel, hvis du senere ønsker at søge ind på vores elevuddannelse, som vi mener, er Danmarks suverænt bedste! Det er ligeledes en stor fordel at have butikserfaring, hvis du drømmer om at arbejde på vores hovedkontor.

  • Ift. den overenskomstmæssig takst pr. marts 2025.

Om jobbet

Som ungarbejder hos os skal du, først og fremmest, hjælpe dine kollegaer, så vores kunder altid får en god indkøbsoplevelse i butikken. Du ved, at du har gjort dit arbejde godt, når du har ydet en god service – og det gør dig glad! Dine opgaver er blandt andet at:

  • Give vores kunder en god oplevelse i butikken sammen med dine kollegaer
  • Få butikken til at shine, ved at fylde op og trimme hylderne så de altid står snorlige
  • Få varerne scannet hurtigt gennem kasseapparatet med et smil på læben
  • Svinge moppen, når gulvet er beskidt

Om dig

Når du starter i Lidl, får du en grundig oplæring i butikken. Derfor er det ikke afgørende for os, at du har erfaring, men vi forventer, at du:

  • Er under 18 år, dog ikke yngre end 15 år
  • Har afsluttet 9. klasse
  • Er smilende og har masser af god energi
  • Har gåpåmod, klør på og vægter teamspirit højt
  • Møder til tiden og er interesseret i at gøre dit arbejde godt
  • Har mulighed for at arbejde eftermiddag, aften og i weekenden

Vi tilbyder

Udover at du får verdensklasse kollegaer, får du som ungarbejder også:

  • Et Lidl-tillæg på 5 kr. mere i timen*
  • Et udbetalt tillæg i henhold til overenskomsten, når du arbejder på skæve tidspunkter - fx aftener, weekender og helligdage
  • Løn og vilkår efter gældende overenskomst med HK
  • Erfaring med at samarbejde i et team og erfaring med service - hvilket vil give dig en stor fordel i dit videre arbejdsliv
  • Fleksible arbejdstider, så du let kan kombinere jobbet med skole og fritidsaktiviteter
  • Et spændende og varieret job med fart over feltet!
  • Gode karrieremuligheder, hvor du får forudsætningerne for at lykkes
  • Rabatordning hos flere udbydere af rejser, shopping, kultur, fitness mm.

Vil du med på #teamlidl?

Nu ved du forhåbentlig endnu mere om #teamlidl og jobbet som ungarbejder, end du gjorde i forvejen! Er jobbet som ungarbejder i Lidl noget for dig? Så send dit motiverede CV allerede i dag!

Sådan søger du stillingen:

  • Klik på ”Søg nu”
  • Udfyld formularen
  • Vedhæft dit motiverede CV

Vi rekrutterer løbende, så send dit motiverede CV hurtigst muligt. Da butikken er åben alle ugens dage, vil der forekomme dag-, aften- og weekendarbejde.

Har du spørgsmål til stillingen eller ansøgningsprocessen, er du velkommen til at kontakte Recruiting på jobilidlvest@lidl.dk eller tlf. 7635 0535, mandag – torsdag 8.00 – 15.00/ fredag 08.00 – 14.00

Vi ser frem til at modtage dit CV!
